<setting>{{setting: minimal studio with seamless background | clean modern interior | urban sidewalk | outdoor natural scene}}. Setting supports the product, does not compete with it.</setting>
<lighting>Soft natural daylight or softbox studio, even exposure, no harsh contrast on the product.</lighting>
<output>1500x2000 PNG, vertical 3:4 for full-body, or 1500x1500 square for waist-up.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no other branded products, no text overlay, no busy background.</negative>
notes: On-model convention: model serves the product, not the other way around. The product must dominate.
Youmind on-model / fashion e-commerce patterns: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/ecommerce-main-image.
antiPatterns: Do not make the product a small part of a busy scene.
Do not include other branded products in the frame.

prompts.title: Knolling flat lay product
prompts.when: You want a top-down flat lay (knolling) of a product set arranged in a clean grid for a hero or category image.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a flat-lay product photographer in the knolling tradition (everything parallel and perpendicular).</role>
<task>Arrange a flat-lay of {{product_set}} on a {{surface}} surface, viewed from directly above.</task>
<composition>All items parallel or perpendicular to each other. Even spacing. Items do not overlap. Top-down 90-degree camera angle.</composition>
<surface>{{surface: white marble | matte concrete | light wood | cream linen | solid pastel}}. Surface fills the frame edge-to-edge.</surface>
<lighting>Soft overhead diffused light, no harsh shadows. Even exposure across the frame.</lighting>
<props>Optional accent props: {{props}}. If used, place 2 to 4 only, in the same parallel-perpendicular rule.</props>
<output>2048x2048 PNG, square.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no angled items, no shadows falling outside the surface, no overlapping products.</negative>
notes: Flat-lay / knolling convention: parallel-and-perpendicular arrangement + top-down 90-degree angle is what defines the genre.
Youmind flat-lay / e-commerce references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/ecommerce-main-image.
antiPatterns: Do not use a 45-degree angled camera.
Do not overlap products.

prompts.title: Product packaging with branding
prompts.when: You want a product and its packaging shown together for a packaging reveal or unboxing mood.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a packaging photographer combining product hero with branded packaging.</role>
<task>Render the {{product_name}} alongside its packaging: {{packaging_description}}.</task>
<composition>Product in the foreground, packaging slightly behind and to the side. Both fully visible. No overlap that hides labels.</composition>
<studio>Seamless paper background in {{bg_color}}. Soft natural shadow.</studio>
<lighting>Soft key light camera-left, soft fill camera-right. Logo and label text on packaging must be legible.</lighting>
<detail>Visible: material (matte / gloss / kraft / glass / metal), texture, embossing if any, brand mark.</detail>
<output>2048x2048 PNG, square.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no other products, no people, no fake-looking brand names, no text besides what's on the real packaging.</negative>
notes: Packaging convention: product + packaging both visible + labels legible is the structure.
Youmind packaging / product marketing references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/product-marketing.
antiPatterns: Do not invent brand names. Use the real product brand or a generic placeholder.
Do not crop the packaging.

prompts.title: Lifestyle product scene
prompts.when: You want a product placed in a real-life scene that conveys the use case and lifestyle.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a lifestyle product photographer who places products in aspirational real-world scenes.</role>
<task>Place {{product_name}} in a {{scene_type}} scene that conveys how it is used.</task>
<scene>{{scene: morning kitchen counter with espresso | office desk with notebook and coffee | park bench with running gear | bathroom shelf with skincare | bedside with book and candle}}.</scene>
<product_visibility>The product is visible and identifiable at thumbnail scale. It does not need to fill the frame but must be the visual anchor.</product_visibility>
<mood>{{mood: cozy and warm | bright and energetic | calm and minimal | luxurious and editorial | active and outdoorsy}}.</mood>
<lighting>Natural window light or on-location ambient. No flash.</lighting>
<output>2000x1333 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no extra branded products, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Lifestyle shot convention: the product is the anchor, the scene is the story. Both must be coherent with the brand.
Youmind lifestyle / e-commerce references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/ecommerce-main-image.
antiPatterns: Do not make the product a tiny detail.
Do not include other branded products.

prompts.title: Color / size variant grid
prompts.when: You want a 3x3 or 2x4 grid showing the same product in every available color or size variant.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an e-commerce listing designer producing a variant grid.</role>
<task>Show the {{product_name}} in {{n_variants}} available color variants: {{list_of_colors}}.</task>
<grid>3x3 or 2x4 grid of equal cells. One product instance per cell. Same camera angle and lighting across all cells.</grid>
<background>Clean white or light gray background in all cells. Product fills 60 percent of each cell.</background>
<label>Small label in the bottom-right of each cell naming the color in 12pt sans-serif.</label>
<consistency>Same scale, same orientation, same crop across all cells. The only thing that changes is the color.</consistency>
<output>1800x1800 PNG, square.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no mixed camera angles, no text other than color names.</negative>
notes: Variant grid convention: identical framing and lighting across cells is what makes the differences read as variants, not as different products.
Youmind e-commerce variant patterns: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/ecommerce-main-image.
antiPatterns: Do not vary the camera angle between cells.
Do not use more than 9 cells. Compress or split.

prompts.title: Floating tech gadget render
prompts.when: You want a hero shot of a tech gadget (phone, headphones, watch) floating with subtle shadow.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a tech product photographer in the Apple-keynote visual tradition.</role>
<task>Render {{tech_gadget}} floating above a {{surface}} surface, centered, slight rotation.</task>
<rotation>Product rotated {{angle: 5 | 10 | 15}} degrees on the Y axis and {{angle: 0 | 5 | 10}} degrees on the X axis for a 3/4 hero view.</rotation>
<shadow>Soft natural shadow below the product on the surface. Shadow must match the product shape, slightly diffused.</shadow>
<background>{{bg: gradient from {{top}} to {{bottom}} | solid color | subtle radial glow}}.</background>
<lighting>Soft key light from upper left, soft fill from lower right. Specular highlights on metal or glass surfaces clearly visible.</lighting>
<output>2048x2048 PNG, square.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no other products, no text, no people, no busy background.</negative>
notes: Floating gadget convention: subtle Y/X rotation + soft natural shadow is the Apple-keynote visual vocabulary.
Youmind tech product references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/product-marketing.
antiPatterns: Do not tilt the product so much that it looks unstable.
Do not use a busy gradient. Subtle is the genre.

prompts.title: Fashion editorial product detail
prompts.when: You want an editorial-style product detail shot (stitching, hardware, fabric) for a fashion brand.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a fashion editor producing a detail shot for a Vogue-level print spread.</role>
<task>Render a tight editorial detail of {{fashion_item}} focusing on {{detail_focus: stitching | hardware | fabric weave | print pattern | texture}}.</task>
<macro>Macro or extreme close-up framing. {{detail_focus}} fills 70 percent of the canvas.</macro>
<lighting>Raked light from the side to emphasize texture and depth. Deep shadows for dimensionality.</lighting>
<palette>Editorial palette: black, white, and one accent {{accent_color}}. Skin or fabric in muted natural tones.</palette>
<model>Optional hand or partial limb visible holding the product. Do not show the full model.</model>
<output>1500x2000 PNG, 3:4 vertical.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no busy background, no text, no full-model framing.</negative>
notes: Editorial detail convention: raked lighting + macro crop is what makes texture read as editorial, not catalog.
Youmind editorial fashion references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not show the full model.
Do not light flatly. Raked light is the genre.

prompts.title: Food product hero shot
prompts.when: You want a hero shot of a food product (pizza, burger, pastry) styled for a menu or delivery listing.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a food photographer in the Bon Appetit / Serious Eats tradition.</role>
<task>Render a hero shot of {{dish_name}}.</task>
<hero>The dish is the subject. Centered or rule-of-thirds. Filling 60 to 80 percent of the canvas.</hero>
<styling>Visible texture: char marks, melted cheese pull, steam, sauce gloss, crumb structure. Hero food photography is about texture.</styling>
<surface>{{surface: dark slate | rustic wood | white ceramic | matte concrete}}. Surface complements the dish without competing.</surface>
<lighting>Side-lit to emphasize texture. Soft fill from camera-left. Visible specular highlights on glossy or wet surfaces.</lighting>
<garnish>One small fresh garnish as the accent: {{garnish}}. Do not overload.</garnish>
<output>2000x1500 PNG, 4:3.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no text overlay, no other dishes, no hands (unless holding a slice in mid-pickup).</negative>
notes: Food hero convention: side light + visible texture + single garnish is the structure.
Youmind food / product marketing references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/product-marketing.
antiPatterns: Do not overload garnishes.
Do not flatten the lighting. Texture is the genre.

prompts.title: Beauty / skincare product hero
prompts.when: You want a beauty or skincare product (bottle, jar, tube) on a soft pastel or marble surface.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a beauty product photographer in the Glossier / Drunk Elephant visual tradition.</role>
<task>Render the {{beauty_product}} on a {{surface}} surface.</task>
<surface>{{surface: soft pastel seamless | white marble | blush pink | cream terrazzo | soft sage}}. Surface must not compete with the product.</surface>
<composition>Product slightly off-center (rule of thirds), leaning slightly back. Optional single ingredient prop: {{ingredient_prop: citrus slice | leaf | flower petal | droplet}} placed near the base.</composition>
<lighting>Soft diffused window light. Specular highlight on the bottle's curve. No hard shadow.</lighting>
<detail>Visible: label typography, cap texture, liquid color or clarity. No smudges.</detail>
<palette>Pastel and neutral. Background {{bg_color}}, product accents in {{accent_color}}.</palette>
<output>2048x2048 PNG, square.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no other products, no text overlay, no busy background.</negative>
notes: Beauty product convention: pastel seamless + soft window light + minimal prop is the Glossier vocabulary.
Youmind beauty / product marketing references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/product-marketing.
antiPatterns: Do not add multiple ingredient props. One is enough.
Do not use a dark dramatic background. Beauty is light.

prompts.title: Studio portrait with softbox
prompts.when: You want a clean studio portrait with classic softbox lighting on a seamless background.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a studio portrait photographer using a 2-light softbox setup.</role>
<task>Render a studio portrait of {{subject_description}}.</task>
<studio>Seamless paper background in {{bg_color}}. Subject standing or seated at a comfortable distance from the paper.</studio>
<lighting>Key softbox 45 degrees camera-left at chest height, fill softbox 30 percent intensity camera-right. Hair light from above-back. No hard shadows on the face.</lighting>
<camera>{{focal_length}}mm equivalent at f/{{aperture}}, ISO {{iso}}, {{shutter}} shutter. Subject fills 60 percent of the frame.</camera>
<expression>{{expression}}. Eyes on the lens.</expression>
<output>1500x2000 PNG, 3:4 vertical, 300dpi equivalent.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no text, no other people, no harsh contrast.</negative>
notes: Studio portrait convention: 2-light softbox pair + hair light is the baseline setup that produces commercial-grade portraits.
Youmind studio portrait references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not mix color temperatures between lights.
Do not use dramatic single-light setups for studio portrait.

prompts.title: Lifestyle candid moment
prompts.when: You want a candid lifestyle photo that looks unposed, in real environments, with natural light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a lifestyle photographer who captures unposed, natural-light moments.</role>
<task>Capture a candid lifestyle moment of {{subject_concept}} in {{setting}}.</task>
<setting>{{setting: cozy kitchen morning | city sidewalk rush | park afternoon | beach sunset | coffee shop read | rooftop golden hour}}.</setting>
<light>Available natural light only. Window light, daylight, or golden hour. No flash. Soft directional shadows.</light>
<moment>The subject is mid-action: laughing, walking, looking away, hands in motion. Not staring at camera.</moment>
<composition>Hand-held framing, slight natural asymmetry, mid-tilt or off-center to feel candid. Depth of field f/2 to f/4 equivalent for background blur.</composition>
<output>2000x1333 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no studio look, no perfectly posed smile at camera, no stiff posture.</negative>
notes: Lifestyle convention: candid + natural light + mid-action is what separates lifestyle from posed stock photography.
Youmind lifestyle / photography references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not pose the subject staring at the camera. Candid means in motion.
Do not use flash. Natural light is the genre.

prompts.title: Street documentary frame
prompts.when: You want a documentary street photo in the Cartier-Bresson / Winogrand tradition with decisive-moment framing.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a street documentary photographer working in the decisive-moment tradition.</role>
<task>Capture a single street documentary frame at {{location}} during {{time_of_day}}.</task>
<moment>A decisive-moment interaction: a hand reaching, eyes meeting, a figure entering frame, a gesture mid-flight. Not a posed scene.</moment>
<geometry>Strong geometric structure: leading lines, frame-within-frame, layered depth. The composition tells the story before the subject is read.</geometry>
<camera>35mm equivalent, f/8 to f/11 for full-scene sharpness. Slight grain, black-and-white or muted color. Eye-level or low angle.</camera>
<light>{{light: harsh midday shadow | overcast soft | sodium-vapor streetlight | window-light bounce | dawn blue}}.</light>
<output>2000x1333 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no tourist-shot look, no centered composition, no smiling subjects at camera.</negative>
notes: Street documentary convention: decisive-moment framing + strong geometry + 35mm f/8 to f/11 is the Cartier-Bresson / Winogrand vocabulary.
Youmind street / documentary photography references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not center the subject. Decisive moments live at the intersections.
Do not pose the scene. Documentary means observed, not staged.

prompts.title: Fashion editorial spread
prompts.when: You want a high-fashion editorial photo in the style of Vogue / Harper's Bazaar / i-D.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a fashion editorial photographer working on a magazine cover or spread.</role>
<task>Render an editorial fashion photo of {{subject_concept}} wearing {{outfit_concept}}.</task>
<concept>One clear visual concept: {{concept: quiet luxury | avant-garde | minimalist | theatrical | sport-luxe | neo-romantic}}.</concept>
<composition>Pose communicates the concept: {{pose_description}}. Negative space is intentional. Asymmetric framing common.</composition>
<lighting>Single editorial light source or mixed sources with intent. Raked light, hard shadow, or soft wrap depending on concept. Studio or on-location, named.</lighting>
<palette>Editorial color grade: muted earth tones, or saturated primary, or desaturated pastel. Skin tone holds natural.</palette>
<output>1500x2000 PNG, 3:4 vertical for spread.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no text overlay, no stock-photo smile, no busy background unless concept demands.</negative>
notes: Fashion editorial convention: one named concept + pose that communicates it + lighting that supports it is the structure.
Youmind fashion editorial references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not mix two visual concepts in one frame.
Do not include the model's full body in tight editorial crops unless the concept requires it.

prompts.title: Food overhead flat lay
prompts.when: You want an overhead flat-lay food photo for a recipe, blog, or menu.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a food photographer specializing in overhead recipe flat lays.</role>
<task>Render an overhead flat lay of {{dish_name}} with optional ingredient props.</task>
<camera>Top-down 90 degrees, f/5.6 for slight focus falloff, 50mm or 35mm equivalent. Subject centered or slightly off-center.</camera>
<surface>{{surface: rustic wood | white marble | dark slate | linen cloth | ceramic tile}}.</surface>
<light>Soft window light from the left or both sides, no harsh shadows. Visible texture on the food.</light>
<props>Ingredient props laid out in a parallel-perpendicular arrangement around the dish: {{ingredients}}. 3 to 6 props max.</props>
<styling>Visible texture: char, sauce gloss, herb flecks, steam if applicable. One fresh garnish accent.</styling>
<output>2000x2000 PNG, square.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no text overlay, no angled camera, no overlapping props.</negative>
notes: Food overhead convention: 90-degree top-down + soft window light + parallel props is the recipe-blog standard.
Youmind food / photography references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not use a 45-degree angle. Overhead is 90 degrees.
Do not overload props.

prompts.title: Architectural interior hero shot
prompts.when: You want a hero architectural interior shot with strong perspective, leading lines, and material detail.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an architectural interior photographer working with tilt-shift and natural light.</role>
<task>Render a hero interior shot of {{space_type}} in {{style: minimalist | brutalist | art deco | modern | industrial | traditional}}.</task>
<perspective>Single-point perspective or strong leading lines. Camera at human eye level or slightly lower for grandeur.</perspective>
<light>Natural light from {{source: window | skylight | clerestory | courtyard}}. Visible light direction creates shadow play.</light>
<materials>Visible: {{materials: concrete | wood | marble | brick | glass | steel}}. Texture and material joinery must read clearly.</materials>
<composition>Foreground, midground, background depth. One strong focal point and supporting geometry.</composition>
<output>2400x1600 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no people (unless scale figures), no text overlay, no over-saturated colors.</negative>
notes: Architectural interior convention: single-point perspective + natural light + material detail is the genre.
Youmind architecture / interior photography references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not over-saturate. Materials should look natural.
Do not include people unless intentional scale figures.

prompts.title: Sports action peak moment
prompts.when: You want a sports photo at the peak of action with motion blur and dramatic light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a sports photographer working at 1/2000s shutter speed at the peak moment of action.</role>
<task>Capture the peak action moment of {{sport_action}}.</task>
<subject>{{athlete_description}} in the moment of {{peak_moment: jump | swing | kick | throw | tackle | dive}}.</subject>
<camera>{{focal_length}}mm equivalent at f/{{aperture}}, 1/{{shutter}} shutter speed, ISO {{iso}}. Subject sharp, background and limbs in motion blur.</camera>
<light>{{light: stadium floodlight | golden hour outdoor | overcast outdoor | indoor arena}}.</light>
<composition>Low angle for grandeur, or high angle for tactical view. Subject dominant in frame. Background identifies the sport setting.</composition>
<output>2400x1600 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no static pose, no studio look.</negative>
notes: Sports action convention: peak-moment timing + fast shutter + selective motion blur is the genre.
Youmind sports / action photography references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not pose the subject. Peak action means mid-motion.
Do not use slow shutter that blurs the subject.

prompts.title: Environmental portrait documentary
prompts.when: You want an environmental portrait where the subject is shown in their working environment with context.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a documentary portrait photographer in the tradition of National Geographic and Magnum.</role>
<task>Render an environmental portrait of {{subject_role}} at their {{workplace}}.</task>
<subject>{{subject_description}}, in the act of their work, not posed. Tools of the trade visible.</subject>
<environment>The workplace is the secondary subject: {{environment_description}}. Visible texture, activity, signs of use.</environment>
<light>Available light. Window, overhead, or on-location natural. Direction visible.</light>
<composition>Subject occupies 40 to 60 percent of frame. Environment surrounds and contextualizes. Wide to normal focal length, no heavy compression.</composition>
<output>2000x1333 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no studio background, no center-on-face crop.</negative>
notes: Environmental portrait convention: subject + workplace + available light is the structure. The setting is part of the story.
Magnum Photos essay references and youmind documentary patterns: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not isolate the subject from the environment.
Do not pose. Mid-work is the genre.

prompts.title: Long exposure night photography
prompts.when: You want a long-exposure night photo with light trails, smooth water, or star trails.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a long-exposure night photographer using a tripod and remote release.</role>
<task>Render a long-exposure night photo at {{location}}.</task>
<exposure>{{shutter}} second exposure at f/{{aperture}}, ISO {{iso}}. Tripod-stable. Motion blurred over time.</exposure>
<subject>{{subject: city skyline | highway light trails | waterfall smooth | star trails | ferris wheel | neon signage}}.</subject>
<light>Available ambient light only: streetlights, car headlights, moonlight, stars, neon. No flash.</light>
<palette>Deep blacks in shadows, saturated color in light sources. Long exposure yields smooth gradients in moving elements.</palette>
<output>2400x1600 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no daylight, no flash, no moving subjects sharp unless intentional.</negative>
notes: Long-exposure convention: slow shutter + tripod stability + available light is the structure. Flash ruins it.
Youmind night / long-exposure references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not use flash. Flash kills long exposure.
Do not capture motion that should be sharp. Intentional motion blur only.

prompts.title: Natural light environmental portrait
prompts.when: You want a natural-light portrait shot outdoors with available sunlight, no flash.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a natural-light portrait photographer using the sun as your key source.</role>
<task>Render a natural-light portrait of {{subject_description}}.</task>
<time>{{time: golden hour | blue hour | overcast midday | dappled shade | window light indoor | sunset backlight}}.</time>
<light>Available sunlight. Position the subject so the light direction supports the face. Soft fill from natural bounce if available.</light>
<camera>85mm equivalent at f/2 for shallow depth of field, ISO 200 to 400, 1/250 shutter. Sharp eyes, soft background.</camera>
<mood>{{mood: warm and intimate | crisp and editorial | soft and dreamy | golden and sun-kissed}}.</mood>
<output>1500x2000 PNG, 3:4 vertical.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no studio lighting, no flash, no harsh midday overhead.</negative>
notes: Natural-light portrait convention: named time of day + 85mm f/2 + sun as key is the structure.
Youmind natural-light portrait references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/photography.
antiPatterns: Do not use flash.
Do not shoot in harsh overhead midday without shade.

prompts.title: 35mm film still with anamorphic flare
prompts.when: You want a film-still image with the look of 35mm or anamorphic cinema, including lens flare and shallow depth.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cinematographer framing a single film still.</role>
<task>Render a single film still for the scene: {{scene_description}}.</task>
<camera>35mm film stock or anamorphic digital equivalent. 2.39:1 widescreen aspect ratio. Horizontal lens flare from {{light_source}}. Oval bokeh.</camera>
<composition>{{shot_type: extreme wide | wide | medium | medium close-up | close-up | extreme close-up}}. Single subject or small group. Negative space intentional.</composition>
<light>{{lighting_setup: motivated key + soft fill | chiaroscuro single source | neon practicals | window bounce | moonlight}}.</light>
<color>Film-emulated color grade: {{grade: teal-and-orange | bleach bypass | cross-processed | warm Kodak | cool Fuji | desaturated sepia}}.</color>
<grain>Visible film grain at ISO 400 to 800 equivalent. Subtle halation around bright sources.</grain>
<output>2400x1000 PNG, 2.39:1 widescreen.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no text, no digital cleanliness, no modern smartphone look.</negative>
notes: 35mm anamorphic convention: 2.39:1 + horizontal flare + oval bokeh is the genre signature.
Youmind cinematic / film still references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not request a square crop. Widescreen is the format.
Do not request clean digital sharpness. Film grain is the genre.

prompts.title: Golden hour film still
prompts.when: You want a warm, golden-hour film still with sun flare and long shadows.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cinematographer shooting the last hour before sunset.</role>
<task>Render a golden-hour film still of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<light>Sun within 10 degrees of the horizon. Warm 3200K-equivalent key light, soft fill from sky. Long horizontal shadows.</light>
<flare>Visible sun flare if sun is in frame, with lens artifacts. Backlight creates rim light on subjects.</flare>
<color>Warm dominant, amber and peach. Sky in pale yellow to coral gradient.</color>
<camera>35mm or 50mm equivalent. Shallow depth of field f/2 to f/2.8. Backlight softens the scene.</camera>
<output>2400x1350 PNG, 16:9.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no midday harsh light, no cold blue tones.</negative>
notes: Golden hour convention: sun within 10 degrees of horizon + warm dominant + backlight rim is the structure.
Youmind golden hour cinematic references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not mix golden hour with cold blue tones.
Do not place the sun overhead.

prompts.title: Film noir black-and-white
prompts.when: You want a high-contrast black-and-white noir film still with venetian-blind shadows and a femme fatale or detective.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 1940s film noir cinematographer working with high-contrast monochrome stock.</role>
<task>Render a noir film still of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<light>Single hard key light from {{source: desk lamp | window with venetian blinds | streetlight | cigarette lighter}}. Deep black shadows. Hard-edged venetian-blind shadow patterns on walls and faces when present.</light>
<contrast>Pure blacks, bright whites, sharp mid-tone separation. No gray fill. Almost no detail in shadow zones.</contrast>
<composition>Low-angle subject shot. Dutch tilt optional. Subject framed through foreground object: doorway, curtain, blind slat.</composition>
<subject>{{subject_type: detective | femme fatale | witness | villain}}. Period wardrobe 1940s. Period props.</subject>
<grain>Heavy 35mm film grain. Halation around any light source.</grain>
<output>1800x1200 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no color, no modern wardrobe, no soft lighting, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Noir convention: single hard key + venetian-blind shadows + low angle + period wardrobe is the genre.
Youmind noir / cinematic references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not add color. Noir is monochrome.
Do not light softly. Hard single source is the genre.

prompts.title: Three-strip Technicolor film still
prompts.when: You want a saturated three-strip Technicolor film still in the Wizard of Oz / Red Shoes tradition.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Technicolor-era cinematographer working in three-strip saturated color.</role>
<task>Render a Technicolor film still of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<color>Hyper-saturated primary palette: deep reds, emerald greens, cobalt blues, rich golds. Skin tones warm and slightly orange. White set pieces read as creamy ivory.</color>
<light>High-key three-point lighting. Soft fill on faces, hard key from above. No deep shadows. Shadow side of the face is still colored and visible.</light>
<makeup>Period-correct heavy makeup on faces. Defined lips, defined brows.</makeup>
<wardrobe>Period costume, saturated fabric colors. {{era}}: 1930s to 1950s.</wardrobe>
<grain>Three-strip Technicolor grain: fine grain, slightly soft focus, no halation. Subtle color fringing on edges.</grain>
<output>1800x1200 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no muted tones, no modern palette, no dark moody lighting, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Three-strip Technicolor convention: hyper-saturated primaries + high-key three-point lighting + heavy period makeup is the genre.
Youmind Technicolor / vintage film references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not mute the colors. Saturated is the genre.
Do not use modern cinematic color grading.

prompts.title: Modern color-graded film still
prompts.when: You want a modern digital-cinema film still with a specific color grade like teal-and-orange or bleach bypass.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a modern colorist working in DaVinci Resolve on a contemporary digital-cinema release.</role>
<task>Render a color-graded film still of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<grade>{{grade: teal-and-orange (sky and shadows pushed teal, skin and midtones pushed orange) | bleach bypass (desaturated with crushed contrast) | cross-processed (shifted primaries, magenta highlights, green shadows) | blocky blockbuster (clean primaries, strong cyan-orange separation) | pastel cinematic (lifted blacks, soft pastels)}}.</grade>
<skin_tone>Skin tone holds natural hue regardless of grade. The grade affects environment and shadows, not faces.</skin_tone>
<lighting>{{lighting_setup}}. Visible motivated source. Hard or soft as the scene demands.</lighting>
<camera>Digital cinema camera equivalent. Anamorphic or spherical. Modern lens rendering.</camera>
<grain>Fine digital noise at ISO 800 to 1600. No halation unless light source is in frame.</grain>
<output>2400x1350 PNG, 16:9.</output>
<negative>no watermark, no text, no film-still watermark, no over-cooked grade.</negative>
notes: Modern color grade convention: named grade + skin tone preserved is the rule. Over-cooked grades look like a tutorial, not a film.
Youmind cinematic / modern color grade references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not let the grade eat the skin tone.
Do not push saturation past the point where the image looks unnatural.

prompts.title: 1940s period film still
prompts.when: You want a 1940s period film still with period wardrobe, props, and lighting.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a period-film production designer and cinematographer.</role>
<task>Render a 1940s film still of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<era>1940 to 1949. Hair, wardrobe, props, architecture, vehicles all period-correct.</era>
<light>Period-correct lighting: tungsten practicals, bare bulbs, kerosene lamps where applicable, daylight through period windows.</light>
<color>Black-and-white or three-strip Technicolor. Pick one.</color>
<camera>Period-correct lens: 35mm or 50mm prime, normal depth of field. Tri-X grain if B&W.</camera>
<composition>Studio-set composition with foreground, midground, background. Practical light sources visible in frame.</composition>
<output>1800x1200 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no modern objects, no modern wardrobe, no modern color grading, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Period convention: era-correct details across wardrobe, props, lighting, and color stock is the structure that survives scrutiny.
Youmind period / cinematic references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not mix modern and period objects.
Do not use a modern lens rendering on a period film still.

prompts.title: Wong Kar-wai step-print neon
prompts.when: You want a Wong Kar-wai-inspired frame with neon, step-print motion blur, and saturated reds and greens.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cinematographer working in the style of Wong Kar-wai (Chungking Express, In the Mood for Love, Fallen Angels).</role>
<task>Render a film still inspired by Wong Kar-wai for the scene: {{scene_description}}.</task>
<color>Highly saturated reds and greens. Slight cyan in shadows. Skin tones warm and slightly orange. Period palette with neon accents.</color>
<light>Available practicals: neon signs, fluorescent tubes, streetlights, lampshades. No studio lighting. Source visible in frame where possible.</light>
<motion>Subtle step-print or slow-shutter motion blur. A moving subject or fabric leaves a 1-frame to 4-frame trailing smear.</motion>
<composition>Tight close-ups or intimate two-shots. 50mm or 85mm equivalent. Foreground objects (hands, fabric, lamp) create depth.</composition>
<mood>Wistful, romantic, lonely-in-a-crowd, or quietly desperate.</mood>
<output>2000x1333 PNG, 3:2.</output>
<negative>no bright daylight, no clean studio lighting, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Wong Kar-wai convention: practical neon sources + saturated reds and greens + step-print motion blur is the genre signature.
Christopher Doyle cinematography references and youmind cinematic patterns: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not light with a clean studio key.
Do not skip the motion smear.

prompts.title: Vintage Super 8 home movie
prompts.when: You want a vintage Super 8 home-movie look with grain, light leaks, and dated color.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cinematographer rendering a Super 8 home-movie frame.</role>
<task>Render a Super 8 home-movie frame of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<stock>Kodachrome 40 (1960s) or Ektachrome 160 (1970s) color rendering. Warm slightly faded palette. Slightly under-saturated compared to modern digital.</stock>
<grain>Heavy Super 8 grain. Visible vertical scratches. Slight registration wobble on edges.</grain>
<light_leaks>One or two light leaks bleeding in from the camera gate, in orange or magenta.</light_leaks>
<composition>Handheld framing, slightly off-center, imperfect horizon. Documentary-feel, not posed.</composition>
<subject>Family, vacation, party, or daily life moment. Not staged. Not studio.</subject>
<output>1800x1200 PNG, 3:2, with rounded-corner crop optional to suggest Super 8 frame.</output>
<negative>no digital cleanliness, no modern wardrobe (unless intentionally anachronistic), no watermark.</negative>
notes: Super 8 convention: named stock + heavy grain + light leaks + handheld imperfection is the structure.
Youmind vintage / Super 8 references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/retro-vintage.
antiPatterns: Do not request modern sharpness.
Do not compose perfectly centered.

prompts.title: Anime-style film still
prompts.when: You want an anime-style film still with cinematic lighting and animation-grade rendering.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an animation director framing a key frame in the style of modern anime cinema (Sakuga tradition).</role>
<task>Render an anime-style cinematic still of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<animation_quality>Modern sakuga-grade: detailed backgrounds with painted texture, characters in dynamic pose with weight, motion lines where applicable.</animation_quality>
<lighting>Dramatic motivated lighting: {{light: backlit silhouette | rim-lit dramatic | soft golden hour | moonlight rim | practical neon}}.</lighting>
<composition>{{shot_type}} with strong geometry. Lead character off-center per rule of thirds. Background carries 50 percent of the visual weight.</composition>
<color>Studio-grade palette: limited but specific, one or two dominant hues, complementary accent. Skin tone in anime-stylized but readable range.</color>
<grain>Optional cel-shaded rendering with crisp line art on characters. Backgrounds painted with soft brush texture.</grain>
<output>2400x1350 PNG, 16:9.</output>
<negative>no photoreal, no chibi proportions in serious scenes, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Anime cinematic convention: sakuga-grade background + dramatic lighting + dynamic pose is the production value marker.
Youmind anime / film still references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/anime-manga.
antiPatterns: Do not request chibi proportions unless the genre calls for it.
Do not skip the background. Cinematic anime has painted backgrounds.

prompts.title: Letterbox widescreen cinematic
prompts.when: You want any composition rendered as a cinematic letterboxed widescreen still.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a colorist and framing specialist producing a cinematic widescreen still.</role>
<task>Render a cinematic letterbox widescreen still for the scene: {{scene_description}}.</task>
<aspect>2.39:1 or 2.35:1 widescreen. Top and bottom letterbox bars in deep black.</aspect>
<composition>Wide or medium-wide shot. Subject placed in the right or left third. Significant horizontal negative space.</composition>
<light>Motivated single key light or practical source. Soft fill. Subtle rim from behind.</light>
<grade>{{grade}}. Skin tone preserved.</grade>
<grain>Subtle film grain. No halation unless light is in frame.</grain>
<output>2400x1000 PNG, 2.39:1.</output>
<negative>no square crop, no TV-shaped 4:3, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Letterbox convention: 2.39:1 aspect + horizontal negative space + black bars is the genre signature.
Youmind cinematic references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/cinematic-film-still.
antiPatterns: Do not deliver a square crop. Letterbox means 2.39:1.
Do not crop the subject to a TV-format 4:3.

prompts.title: Shoujo manga romance panel
prompts.when: You want a shoujo manga-style romance illustration with sparkles, soft screentones, and bishie eyes.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a shoujo manga artist in the tradition of classic 1990s to 2000s shoujo (Sailor Moon, Fruits Basket, Ouran High School Host Club).</role>
<task>Render a shoujo romance illustration of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<character>{{character_description}}. Large detailed eyes with multiple highlights, long lashes, small nose and mouth. Hair in detailed flowing strands.</character>
<style>Clean line art, soft screentone shading, large sparkling eyes. Decorative background elements: flowers, sparkles, ribbon, light rays.</style>
<palette>Soft pastel palette: pink, peach, lavender, mint. Skin tones pale and slightly pink.</palette>
<composition>Romantic or yearning pose. Two characters facing each other or one looking at the other longingly. Visible emotion through eye focus and small blush marks.</composition>
<output>Vertical 2:3 PNG, suitable for manga panel.</output>
<negative>no photoreal, no horror, no chibi (unless specifically requested), no watermark.</negative>
notes: Shoujo convention: large eyes with multiple highlights + screentones + sparkle decoration is the genre.
Youmind shoujo / anime references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/anime-manga.
antiPatterns: Do not render realistic eye proportions. Shoujo eyes are oversized.
Do not skip the decorative sparkles or flowers.

prompts.title: Shounen action battle panel
prompts.when: You want a high-energy shounen battle frame with speed lines, impact effects, and dynamic pose.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a shounen manga artist in the tradition of Dragon Ball, Naruto, My Hero Academia, Jujutsu Kaisen.</role>
<task>Render a shounen battle frame of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<character>{{character_description}}. Sharp angular features, intense eyes, spiky or dynamic hair. Costume with visible damage from prior combat.</character>
<action>Peak-action pose: mid-punch, mid-jump, mid-energy-blast. Visible energy aura or power effect around the character.</action>
<effects>Speed lines radiating from the action, impact burst lines, dust and debris, energy crackle patterns.</effects>
<composition>Strong diagonal lines. Low angle for power. Background pushed into perspective distortion.</composition>
<palette>High-contrast saturated: primary colors, deep blacks, accent energy color {{energy_color}}.</palette>
<output>Vertical 2:3 PNG or horizontal 16:9 for spread.</output>
<negative>no soft pastel, no romance, no chibi, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Shounen convention: speed lines + impact burst + diagonal composition + saturated primary palette is the genre.
Youmind shounen / anime references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/anime-manga.
antiPatterns: Do not pose the character statically. Action frames need mid-motion.
Do not skip the speed lines or impact effects.

prompts.title: Slice-of-life anime scene
prompts.when: You want a soft iyashi-kei slice-of-life anime scene with cozy daily-life atmosphere.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a slice-of-life anime artist in the iyashi-kei tradition (Yotsuba, Aria, Flying Witch).</role>
<task>Render a slice-of-life anime scene of {{scene_description}}.</task>
<setting>Cozy domestic or small-town setting: {{setting: kitchen | café | bookshop | garden | rooftop | station}}. Detailed background with signs of life: books, plants, tea cups, scattered items.</setting>
<time>{{time: morning | afternoon | sunset | evening}}. Warm or cool soft light. Natural window or sun lighting.</time>
<character>Optional single or two characters in casual clothing. Not posing for the camera, doing a daily activity.</character>
<style>Soft line art, watercolor-like background washes, low saturation, warm color temperature. Visible brushstroke texture in background.</style>
<palette>Soft pastels and warm neutrals. Sky and ambient light take 60 percent of the color weight.</palette>
<output>Horizontal 16:9 PNG or square 1:1.</output>
<negative>no action, no horror, no neon, no high contrast, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Iyashi-kei convention: cozy domestic + soft watercolor background + warm low-saturation palette is the genre.
Youmind slice-of-life / anime references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/anime-manga.
antiPatterns: Do not add action or combat elements. Slice-of-life is contemplative.
Do not use neon or high saturation.

prompts.title: Mecha robot design sheet
prompts.when: You want an original mecha design in the tradition of Gundam, Evangelion, or Code Geass.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a mecha designer in the tradition of Sunrise, Gainax, and Bandai mechanical design.</role>
<task>Design an original mecha for {{role: general combat | reconnaissance | artillery | stealth | support | commander unit}}.</task>
<silhouette>Distinctive silhouette readable at thumbnail size. Mix of hard angular armor and a few curved surfaces. Visible weapon signature.</silhouette>
<proportions>Head-to-body ratio of approximately 1:6. Asymmetric design elements to convey uniqueness. Optional anime-style 'face' on the head unit.</proportions>
<color>Primary armor color {{primary_color}}, accent {{accent_color}}, sensor color {{sensor_color}} (usually green, red, or yellow). Limited to {{n}} colors total.</color>
<panel_layout>Show 3 views in a clean technical layout: front, three-quarter, side. Optional detail callouts of weapons or thrusters.</panel_layout>
<background>Plain white or light gray. No scenery.</background>
<output>Horizontal 3:1 PNG for a 3-view sheet, or 2:3 vertical for a hero pose.</output>
<negative>no photoreal, no watermark, no scenery background.</negative>
notes: Mecha design convention: distinctive silhouette + asymmetric design + 3-view layout is the production-design standard.
Youmind mecha / anime references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/anime-manga.
antiPatterns: Do not render the mecha in a busy background. Plain background is the convention.
Do not exceed 5 colors total.

prompts.title: Isekai portal arrival scene

<protagonist>{{protagonist_description}}. Mid-step through the portal. Backlit by magic. Hair or clothing slightly lifted by portal wind.</protagonist>
<palette>Saturated fantasy palette: glowing teal / purple / gold portal against the environment's natural tones.</palette>
<style>Modern anime illustration, crisp line art, painted background, particle effects.</style>
<output>Vertical 2:3 PNG.</output>
<negative>no photoreal, no chibi, no text, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Isekai convention: magic circle portal + backlit protagonist + fantasy world beyond is the genre.
Youmind isekai / anime references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/anime-manga.
antiPatterns: Do not omit the magic circle. The portal is the genre marker.
Do not use muted palette. Isekai arrival is saturated.

prompts.title: Chibi super-deformed character
prompts.when: You want a chibi super-deformed character with 2 to 3 head-tall proportions and exaggerated cute features.
prompts.prompt:

<task>Render a chibi version of {{character_description}}.</task>

<expression>One exaggerated expression: {{expression: happy sparkle | grumpy pout | surprised gasp | smug smirk | sleepy | embarrassed}}. Large sparkle or sweat drop as accessory emotion marker.</expression>

<palette>Bright saturated. 4 to 6 colors total. Skin tone light and slightly pink.</palette>
<output>Square 1:1 PNG or vertical 2:3.</output>
<negative>no realistic proportions, no horror, no watermark.</negative>

Youmind chibi references: https://youmind.com/prompts/image/chibi-q-style.
antiPatterns: Do not render realistic proportions. Chibi is super-deformed by definition.
