<task>Draft the corrections policy and operating procedures for the newsroom below.</task>
<newsroom>{{the_newsroom}}</newsroom>
<method>
1. State the principle: corrections are a core editorial product, not a sidebar.
2. Set the trigger: who reports a suspected error. Per newsroom SLA.
3. Define the categorization: typo vs. factual error vs. context error vs. unethical framing.
4. Define the promptness: per category, time-to-correct (hours to days).
5. Define the visibility: top-of-page note, footer note, retraction, full retraction.
6. Define the transparency: show what was wrong, when it was first published, when corrected.
7. Define the appeals: external correction requests, right of reply.
8. Define the audit: periodic audits of corrections, response time, public log.
9. Define the social correction policy: how social platforms update too.
10. Define the archives: how archives (Wayback, Internet Archive) are corrected.
</method>
<output_format>
## Principle
## Trigger and SLA
## Categorization
## Promptness
## Visibility
## Transparency
## Appeals and right of reply
## Audit cadence
## Social policy
## Archives policy
## Public log link
</output_format>
<quality_bar>
- Each error category must have a measurable SLA.
- The public log must be visible. Corrections are a credibility product.
</quality_bar>
notes: IFCN Code of Principles section on transparency.
BBC Editorial Standards: https://www.bbc.co.uk/editorialguidelines.
New York Times standards and ethics guidelines.
antiPatterns: Do not bury corrections. They are the credibility signal.
Do not apologize and leave ambiguous what changed.

prompts.title: FIFA World Cup stadium fan transformation pack
prompts.when: You want to drop the subject into a packed FIFA World Cup crowd wearing the home nation's jersey.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a sports photo editor stitching the subject into a national-team crowd scene for social posts.</role>
<task>Transform the uploaded subject photo into a realistic FIFA World Cup match-day fan scene. The subject must be visibly wearing the official national jersey of {{country}}, holding a team scarf, and sitting inside a packed football stadium.</task>
<subject>Identity must be preserved: {{subject_face}}, {{hair}}, {{skin_tone}}. Do not change facial bone structure, eye color, or hairstyle.</subject>
<scene>Packed bowl stadium, FIFA banner across the upper tier, pitch visible in the mid-distance, fans in matching team colors filling every seat. Confetti in the air. Big-screen scoreboard in the background.</scene>
<style>Documentary sports photography. Canon EF 70-200mm f/2.8 shallow depth of field. Natural expressions, candid joy or tension. Editorial color, slight film grain.</style>
<lighting>Late-afternoon stadium light, mixed natural and floodlight, no harsh flash.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, 8K detail, no watermark, no logo other than generic FIFA-tier banner.</output>
<negative>no text overlays, no caricature, no anime, no extra faces that look like the subject, no other kits mixed in.</negative>
notes: Pattern adapted from the youmind FIFA 2026 Selfie Pack (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/fifa-2026-selfie-pack). Emphasis on identity preservation plus realistic crowd blending is the core viral formula.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the explicit identity-anchor list. Without it the model substitutes a different face.
Do not ask for a smiling action pose. Stadium fans shout, point, and grimace more than they smile.

prompts.title: FIFA TV broadcast screenshot pack
prompts.when: You need a frame that looks like it was lifted from a live FIFA TV broadcast with score banner, ticker, and replay wipe.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a virtual FIFA broadcast graphics operator capturing the moment a goal is scored.</role>
<task>Generate a frame that resembles a live World Cup broadcast screenshot: 16:9 widescreen with a permanent score banner across the top, a scrolling ticker along the bottom, and a small replay wipe in the lower-left corner.</task>
<pitch_scene>Cinematic mid-action shot on a floodlit pitch at night. Two teams in contrasting kits. One attacker just struck the ball, goalkeeper diving. Crowd blurred in the stands.</pitch_scene>
<broadcast_chrome>
- Top banner: dark blue ribbon, team crests on each side, central scoreboard reads {{score}}.
- Bottom: thin yellow sports ticker with mid-sentence text.
- Lower-left: pip-in-pip replay wipe with a 1-second-delay frame.
- Subtle scan-line overlay and timecode in upper-right (HH:MM:SS:FF).
</broadcast_chrome>
<style>1080i broadcast look, slight softness, halation on floodlights, no flicker.</style>
<output>Aspect 16:9, photorealistic stadium photo plus broadcast chrome, 1920x1080.</output>
<negative>no extra watermarks, no YouTube player UI, no chat overlay, no vertical phone crop.</negative>
notes: Pattern derived from the youmind FIFA Broadcast Simulation entry (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/fifa-2026-selfie-pack). Adding broadcast chrome is what makes it read as TV rather than a still photo.
antiPatterns: Do not omit the scan-line or ticker. Without broadcast artifacts, it just looks like a regular photo.
Do not stack multiple replay wipes. One pip-in-pip is the convention; more looks like a director monitor.

prompts.title: FIFA celebrity encounter selfie pack
prompts.when: You want a hyper-realistic selfie of the subject standing next to a celebrity footballer at a stadium tunnel.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a celebrity photo compositor merging {{subject_reference}} with a football star at a tunnel entry.</role>
<task>Create a hand-held selfie taken at the stadium tunnel entrance where the subject stands shoulder-to-shoulder with a world-famous footballer, both smiling wide.</task>
<subject_pair>Subject on the left (preserve identity exactly), {{footballer_name}} on the right in a post-match kit, sweat on forehead, laces untied, winner medal peeking out of his grip.</subject_pair>
<setting>Stadium player tunnel. Concrete walls, LED signage behind them reading FIFA WORLD CUP 2026, a security guard blurred in the background, kit bags on the floor.</setting>
<camera>Handheld iPhone 15 Pro selfie perspective, mild wide-angle distortion at edges, slight thumb-visible in the lower-left corner.</camera>
<lighting>Tungsten tunnel lights mixed with daylight spilling from the pitch at the end of the corridor.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, subtle motion blur on the security guard, no filter.</output>
<negative>no logos other than FIFA, no other players, no pitch visible, no hat or sunglasses on the footballer unless specified.</negative>
notes: Pattern inspired by the youmind Celebrity Encounter Selfie FIFA entry (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/fifa-2026-selfie-pack). The thumb-visible-at-corner wide-angle cue is the giveaway that sells the selfie read.
antiPatterns: Do not pose both subjects facing the viewer like a studio portrait. Real tunnel selfies are angled up.
Do not give the footballer a model clean-shaven editorial look. Post-match sweat sells the encounter.

prompts.title: FIFA luxury jersey mirror selfie pack
prompts.when: You want a luxury-mirror-selfie of the subject wearing an authentic World Cup jersey in a high-end hotel room.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a fashion sports photographer staging a luxury mirror selfie.</role>
<task>Compose a full-length mirror selfie of the subject wearing the {{country}} official FIFA World Cup jersey, in a high-end hotel suite.</task>
<subject>Subject holds the phone at chest height, face partially obscured by the phone but hair and outfit fully visible. Identity locked from the reference.</subject>
<setting>Marble-floored hotel suite. Floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking a lit stadium at dusk. Designer luggage on the bench. Champagne bucket on the bar.</setting>
<jersey>Authentic-spec national team jersey, sleeve sponsor patches, proper collar trim, breathable knit visible on close inspection.</jersey>
<camera>iPhone 15 Pro ultra-wide, mild barrel distortion, mirror edge visible in frame, sliver of subject arm holding phone in lower margin.</camera>
<lighting>Mixed warm tungsten lamps and cool blue twilight from the window.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, no logo other than FIFA on the jersey.</output>
<negative>no team logos larger than regulation, no pitch visible, no stadium seats in the room.</negative>
notes: Pattern adapted from youmind Luxury Mirror Selfie Football Jersey (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/fifa-2026-selfie-pack). Keeping the phone visible in-frame is mandatory for the mirror-selfie read.
antiPatterns: Do not crop out the phone. The phone in the subject hand is what sells the genre.
Do not show the subject face-on. Slightly turned three-quarter keeps the focus on the jersey.

prompts.title: NBA playoff court celebration pack
prompts.when: You want a subject dropped into an NBA playoff court celebration with team colors and crowd behind them.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an NBA team photo editor staging a court-side celebration frame.</role>
<task>Place the subject onto an NBA playoff court at the moment the buzzer sounds, surrounded by teammates, wearing a {{team}} jersey, holding a towel.</task>
<subject>Identity preserved. Sweat on forehead, mouth open mid-shout, arms raised.</subject>
<scene>Hardwood court, confetti cannons mid-burst above the basket, fans in the lower bowl standing and cheering, scoreboard reading 0.0 seconds.</scene>
<jersey>{{team}} road jersey (specific year you call out), regulation NBA sponsor patch on chest, NBA 75 anniversary logo on the collar.</jersey>
<lighting>Arena halogen key from above, hard shadows on the court, fill flash from camera position.</lighting>
<camera>35mm wide, eye-level, slight grain typical of Getty playoff imagery.</camera>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, no watermark.</output>
<negative>no anime, no logos other than NBA, no half-court view, no mascot in the foreground.</negative>
notes: Pattern modeled on Getty Sports / NBA photo bank conventions: hard arena lighting, confetti timing, 0.0 scoreboard anchor.
Anchoring 0.0 seconds on the scoreboard is the most reliable way to land on a buzzer-beater moment.
antiPatterns: Do not include the trophy lift in this frame. Reserve that for a separate entry in the same pack.
Do not make the crowd pixelated. A photoreal crowd is what separates this from stock art.

prompts.title: NBA tunnel arrival fit pack
prompts.when: You want the subject in a viral pre-game tunnel arrival outfit, shot street-style photography.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a streetwear photographer covering the tunnel walk before tip-off.</role>
<task>Render a full-body streetwear fit photo of the subject walking through a dim arena tunnel, surrounded by stylists and security.</task>
<scene>Concrete tunnel, exposed conduit overhead, single strip of LED along the floor, security guard in dark suit behind the subject, stylist carrying a garment bag.</scene>
<outfit>High-fashion streetwear: oversized {{brand}} varsity jacket, raw-hem selvedge denim, limited-edition sneakers, designer crossbody bag, signet rings.</outfit>
<camera>35mm f/1.4, eye-level, subject steps toward the camera. Backlit subject rim from the arena opening at the end of the tunnel.</camera>
<lighting>Moody tungsten tunnel, cool backlight from the arena.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5 vertical, photorealistic, slight grain.</output>
<negative>no logo-heavy fake streetwear, no anime, no halftone, no text watermark.</negative>
notes: NBA tunnel fits have become their own visual genre since 2018. Photographer vs. streetwear crossover style is canon (https://www.gq.com/story/nba-tunnel-fashion).
antiPatterns: Do not overload the subject with logos. Editorial fits use one statement piece, not five.
Do not give the subject a posed front-view. Tunnel walks are mid-stride.

prompts.title: Formula 1 podium champagne shower pack
prompts.when: You want the subject on the top step of an F1 podium mid-champagne-shower with team kit and trophy.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Getty sports photographer capturing a 1st-place F1 podium.</role>
<task>Compose a mid-celebration shot of the subject on the top step of an F1 podium, sparkling cider spraying across the frame.</task>
<scene>P1 step is one notch higher than the flanking steps. Carbon-fiber trophies on each plinth, team garage flatscreen in the backdrop, sponsor logos (Rolex, DHL, Pirelli) on the hoarding wall.</scene>
<subject>Subject wears the {{team}} fireproof race suit partially unzipped at the neck, team cap, sunglasses pushed up on the cap. Identity preserved. One hand lifting the large champagne bottle, the other raised in victory.</subject>
<camera>Canon 400mm f/2.8 telephoto from across the podium, shallow depth of field, sparkle of cider catching backlight.</camera>
<lighting>Late-afternoon sun raking the podium, ringlight haze from the champagne spray.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 3:2, photorealistic, 8K, no watermark.</output>
<negative>no rain, no podium girls (deprecated), no track visible, no F1 car in the frame.</negative>
notes: F1 podium photography has a strict visual language since Liberty Media (post-2017): monochrome team kits, oversized trophies, sunlit champagne. Reference: https://www.formula1.com.
antiPatterns: Do not include multiple champagne bottles mid-shake. One big bottle per side reads cleanly.
Do not stock-photo it with fake branded steps. Use authentic team color treads.

prompts.title: F1 paddock lifestyle pack
prompts.when: You want a relaxed paddock-club lifestyle image: hospitality suite, espresso, telemetry screens, race-start countdown.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a hospitality lifestyle photographer documenting an F1 weekend.</role>
<task>Render a candid inside-paddock lifestyle scene at a Grand Prix weekend, the subject seated in the {{team}} hospitality suite.</task>
<scene>Minimal-modern hospitality suite overlooking the pit lane. Telemetry screens on the wall behind, espresso bar to the right, team principal at the table working a tablet. View of the pit garages below.</scene>
<subject>The subject wears a tailored team polo, sunglasses on the collar, race-day lanyard with paddock pass. Lounging with a small espresso, smiling at the team principal.</subject>
<camera>50mm f/1.4, soft focus on background screens, natural daylight flooding the suite.</camera>
<lighting>Late-morning ambient, soft window light.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5 vertical, photorealistic, lifestyle editorial vibe.</output>
<negative>no beer, no logos of competing teams, no security in frame, no track action.</negative>
notes: Inspired by the rising category of F1 lifestyle content documented in Hypebeast and Vanity Fair F1 verticals. Patterns: suit-and-sneaker hybrid, espresso over champagne, telemetry on display.
antiPatterns: Do not place the subject in a race seat or wearing a helmet. The whole point of this pack is the off-track read.
Do not render trackside grandstands. Paddock club is its own environment.

prompts.title: Olympic medal ceremony podium pack
prompts.when: You want the subject on an Olympic podium with gold medal around the neck, anthem in the air.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an Olympic photo bureau photographer covering the medal ceremony.</role>
<task>Generate a podium portrait of the subject as a gold medalist at the {{sport}} medal ceremony.</task>
<scene>Three-tier podium under the Olympic rings banner. National flag rising on the central mast behind. Anthem podium to the left. Athletes in official {{country}} Olympic team kit.</scene>
<subject>Subject stands on P1, gold medal visible, anthem hand-on-heart pose, focused proud expression, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>70-200mm, eye-level across the podium, third-place silver and bronze medalists slightly out of focus on flanking steps.</camera>
<lighting>Stadium floodlit, flat even wash, no harsh shadows.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, official team-kit accurate.</output>
<negative>no podium girls, no fireworks yet, no broadcast graphics.</negative>
notes: Following IOC Olympic Image guidelines: rings banner, anthem posture, official kit integrity. https://olympics.com/ioc.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the anthem hand-on-heart gesture. That is the photographic anchor of the genre.
Do not let the medal dangle from a black ribbon. Olympic medals hang from a colored sash.

prompts.title: FIFA stadium mood reel pack
prompts.when: You need a 10 to 15 second vertical reel of a packed stadium crowd chanting, captured on a fan phone.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a fan-filmmaker shooting a vertical social-media reel inside a World Cup stadium.</role>
<scene>Packed upper-tier seats, fans wearing {{country}} colors, scarves held high. The stadium bowl is lit, confetti drifting from upper tiers.</scene>
<subject>The crowd, with the camera swinging left across the seats, capturing individual fan reactions in close-up as it moves.</subject>
<motion>Handheld phone-cam sway. The camera pans from left to right, tilting up to the upper deck, then swivels back down to the pitch. Stitched jump-cuts every 2-3 seconds.</motion>
<camera>9:16 vertical, smartphone-grade lens (equiv 24mm), slight stabilization jitter, natural focus pulls on nearer faces.</camera>
<lighting>Floodlit stadium at dusk, ambient mix of natural twilight and artificial light.</lighting>
<audio>Chanting rising in waves, drums, vuvuzelas (softly mixed under chants), ambient roar.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 12 seconds, slight grain, no watermark.</output>
<negative>no close-up of a clear face belonging to a named person, no broadcast graphics, no text overlay, no police.</negative>
notes: Pattern inspired by the youmind FIFA pack reel genre (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/fifa-2026-selfie-pack). The 9:16 jump-cut style mirrors TikTok/Reels conventions.
antiPatterns: Do not anchor on a single face for the full duration. The crowd pan is the genre.
Do not request slow motion. Real fan footage is mid-speed and slightly shaky.

prompts.title: FIFA goal celebration smoke flare pack
prompts.when: You want a 10-second pyro-lit goal celebration with smoke flares, face paint, jersey pull.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a TV sports cinematographer capturing the immediate aftermath of a World Cup goal.</role>
<scene>A pocket of the stadium lower bowl. Goal just scored. Fans climb the hoarding, flares ignite, smoke fills the frame.</scene>
<subject>Fan subjects in {{country}} colors. Faces painted, shirts pulled over heads, arms thrown upward. No named individuals, just a faceless mass of supporters.</subject>
<motion>Camera is locked on the tripod for the first 5 seconds as the smoke rolls toward the lens. In the final 5 seconds a slight handheld push-in starts.</motion>
<camera>Super 35mm sensor look, anamorphic flare on lights, grain.</camera>
<lighting>Flare smoke carries orange and red tones that wash the lower faces. Stadium floodlight backlights the smoke.</lighting>
<audio>Goal roar, drum hits, flare hiss, chants layering up.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 10 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no pyro on the pitch, no security, no text overlay, no broadcaster cutaways.</negative>
notes: Goal-celebration cinematography relies on locked-off camera plus flare for the visceral read. Inspired by Canal+ Ligue 1 b-roll conventions.
antiPatterns: Do not mix slow motion with realtime in the same take. Pick one tempo.
Do not include promotional banners that obscure the crowd.

prompts.title: NBA buzzer-beater celebration sequence pack
prompts.when: You want a 12-second narrative sequence from the inbound pass through the buzzer-beater to bench eruption.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an NBA broadcast replay director laying in a buzzer-beater highlight.</role>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-3s): Inbound pass, ball moves around the perimeter, defender closes.
Beat 2 (3-6s): Pull-up jumper from the logo, ball arcs toward the hoop.
Beat 3 (6-9s): Ball drops through the net as red LEDs light the backboard. Red strobe on the shot clock.
Beat 4 (9-12s): Bench erupts, players pile on the court, scorer chest-bumps a teammate.
</narrative_arc>
<subject>One scorer in a {{team}} jersey, mid-jersey-pull celebration. Identity generic, no named NBA players.</subject>
<motion>Hard cuts between four camera angles matching the four beats. The fourth beat is handheld inside the celebration pile.</motion>
<camera>Mix of broadcast jib, court-side lens, and overhead Skycam.</camera>
<lighting>Arena floodlit, halation on the strobe, no shadows.</lighting>
<audio>Building crowd, sneaker squeak, swish of net, buzzer, bench roar.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 12 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no replay wipe, no announcer, no score bug overlay, no mascot in celebration pile.</negative>
notes: Pattern anchored on NBA on ESPN presentation beats: 4 distinct angles per highlight, hard cuts, bench eruption as the closer (https://www.espn.com/nba).
antiPatterns: Do not crowd each beat with extra action. Each beat needs a single dominant motion.
Do not skip the red strobe. The shot-clock strobe is the genre anchor.

prompts.title: NBA locker room champagne celebration pack
prompts.when: You want a chaotic, joyful 15-second locker room champagne celebration clip after an NBA playoff series win.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a handheld cinematographer inside an NBA locker room post-series-clincher.</role>
<scene>Concrete-floored locker room, mostly dim, with one overhead hot spotlight. Lockers open, jerseys hanging, sneakers on the floor.</scene>
<subject>A swirl of {{team}}-clad players. Generic faces, no named individuals. Champagne bottles being sprayed, music playing from a Bluetooth speaker on the bench, phones filming.</subject>
<motion>Handheld vertical pivot, weaving through the celebration. Subject droplets hit the lens at one point, clearing up to reveal a player raising the conference trophy.</motion>
<camera>16mm handheld, slight grain, low-light noise, droplets on the lens.</camera>
<lighting>One hot directional spotlight, mobile phone flash from the periphery.</lighting>
<audio>Loud reggaeton from the speaker, screaming, champagne hiss, lockers slamming.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 15 seconds, photojournalistic.</output>
<negative>no named players, no faces visible in extreme close-up, no brand logos on the speaker.</negative>
notes: Locker room footage has a distinct documentary texture: droplet-smeared lens, Bluetooth speakers, vertical phone framing. Draws on The Ringer NBA coverage.
antiPatterns: Do not light the room evenly. One hot directional source is the genre.
Do not stage a trophy lift as the first beat. Earning it mid-clip is more dramatic.

prompts.title: F1 starting grid pre-race walk pack
prompts.when: You want an 18-second grid walk pre-race: drivers to their cars, last interviews, tire blankets lifted.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a grid-side cinematographer moving between cars before lights out.</role>
<scene>Formula 1 grid, twenty cars lined up. Mechanics crouched behind tires. Sky dark, artificial flood lighting. Tyre blankets being whipped off as the formation clock counts down.</scene>
<motion>Camera tracks right along the grid line. We pass three or four cars, hear different radio fragments, see mechanics in {{team}} kit wave the driver in, then it tilts up to the formation lights glowing red.</motion>
<camera>20mm wide handheld, low height near the pit wall, slight grain.</camera>
<lighting>Floodlit, deep contrast under the chassis where shadows pool.</lighting>
<audio>Engine ignition sequence layered over team radio chatter, a starting theme rises.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 18 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no race start, no driver named directly, no flag, no fans in frame.</negative>
notes: Grid-walk cinematography conventions borrow from F1 TV feeds and Netflix Drive to Survive handheld moments.
antiPatterns: Do not compress the timeline. Real grid walks breathe; no quick cuts.
Do not mix F2 or NASCAR footage. Stay Formula 1 specific.

prompts.title: F1 two-second pit stop video pack
prompts.when: You want a 6-second reel of an F1 four-tire pit stop, both real-time and slow-motion overlaid or sequenced.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an F1 broadcast slo-mo replay operator on a pit lane camera.</role>
<narrative_two_takes>
Take 1 (real-time, 0-2.5s): Car enters box, lollipop lifts, mechanics strike. Car drops at end of stop.
Take 2 (slow-motion, 2.5-6s): Wheel-nut close-up, mechanic slides across the front on his knees, car releases with front jack still raised as the driver guns it.
</narrative_two_takes>
<scene>Pit box with painted lane markings, fuel hose optional, mechanics in matching fireproof kit.</scene>
<camera>Static telephoto from the pit wall, 400mm equivalent, shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Overhead garage floods on the white lines, hot specular on the wheel nut.</lighting>
<audio>Wheel-gun buzz, jack up/down click, engine note, radio squawk.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 60fps, 6 seconds total (realtime then slow-mo).</output>
<negative>no cross-traffic, no sponsor on the wall, no virtual overlay.</negative>
notes: Two-take pit stop pattern (real-time then slow-mo) is canonical F1 broadcast structure, especially on Sky Sports F1.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the lollipop or light. The driver release command is visually mandatory.
Do not allow video shot at eye level. Pit camera is chest high on the wall.

prompts.title: Christmas sweater holiday portrait pack
prompts.when: You want the subject in an ugly Christmas sweater, holding a mug, with bokeh string lights behind.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a holiday-card photographer capturing an indoor Christmas portrait.</role>
<task>Render a warm holiday-card portrait of {{subject_reference}} in an ugly Christmas sweater, holding a ceramic mug.</task>
<subject>Identity preserved. Beaming smile, faux-fur-trimmed sweater with embedded LED string lights, holding a Cocoa Crew branded mug.</subject>
<background>Soft focus Christmas tree with warm-white LED string lights creating bokeh circles. Stockings hung on a faux fireplace. Plaid throw on the couch edge.</background>
<camera>85mm portrait lens, f/1.4, eye-level, soft skin falloff.</camera>
<lighting>Warm Christmas tree key, candlelight fill from the right, no flash.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, holiday-card print-ready at 300 dpi.</output>
<negative>no text overlay, no logos, no religious iconography unless requested.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the evergreen holiday portrait genre with a deliberate ugly-sweater twist. References Hallmark-style compositions and modern Pinterest ugly-sweater trends.
antiPatterns: Do not include a fire that is actually lit. A fireplace in a portrait is notoriously hard to render.
Do not allow a wreath on the face. Wreaths belong on doors and behind shoulders.

prompts.title: Christmas card family group pack
prompts.when: You want a six-person family / friend Christmas-card group shot in matching pajamas.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Christmas-card studio photographer arranging a six-person group in matching pajamas.</role>
<task>Render a holiday-card group portrait of six people in matching buffalo-plaid pajamas, posed on a rustic staircase.</task>
<subjects>Four adults and two children, varied ages {{ages}}. Smiling at camera, holding wrapped presents with name tags.</subjects>
<background>Wide staircase with garland and battery-operated candles on the banister. Christmas tree to the right. Slightly oversized stockings hung on a mantel.</background>
<camera>35mm wide to fit six at full length, eye-level, even lighting across the group.</camera>
<lighting>Soft warm window light from camera-left, fill from a bounce card camera-right.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, balanced skin tones, printable.</output>
<negative>no cartoon stylization, no religious scene, no messy pile of wrapping paper on the floor.</negative>
notes: Pattern reflects modern Shutterfly / Minted Christmas-card composition conventions.
antiPatterns: Do not crowd everyone in front of the tree only. Staircase adds vertical interest.
Do not include pets unless requested. Kids and dogs in group shots double the failure rate.

prompts.title: Halloween costume portrait pack
prompts.when: You want the subject in a specific Halloween costume under studio lighting with a moody backdrop.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a portrait photographer staging a high-end Halloween costume session.</role>
<task>Render a studio portrait of the subject as {{character}} against a dark velvet backdrop with rim lighting.</task>
<subject>Identity preserved under the {{costume}}. Use reference face. Visible hands and any signature props.</subject>
<makeup>Prosthetic-quality makeup with painted textures, no smudging visible.</makeup>
<camera>85mm f/1.4, eye-level, deep focus on the makeup detail.</camera>
<lighting>Hard key from upper-left, kicker rim from upper-right, velvet swallowing fill.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, 8K detail to show makeup texture.</output>
<negative>no cartoon, no anime, no text, no watermark.</negative>
notes: Builds on the classic Halloween portrait photography genre with a Pinterest / Beistle props-and-backdrop perspective.
antiPatterns: Do not stack a head plus body costume on the same subject if reference shows just one. Pick a head-treatment OR a body-treatment, not both.
Do not light the backdrop evenly. Velvet absorbs light for a reason.

prompts.title: Halloween pumpkin carving still life pack
prompts.when: You want a moody still life of a freshly carved Halloween jack-o-lantern on a porch step.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a still-life photographer for a Halloween editorial.</role>
<task>Compose a moody close-up still life of a freshly carved jack-o-lantern glowing from within, on a foggy porch step.</task>
<subject>One large orange pumpkin with a {{pattern: classic / haunting / whimsical}} carving. Glowing teal-orange LED candle inside. Pulp strings and seeds still on the doorstep.</subject>
<background>Foggy porch at twilight, broom and old boots to the side, dry autumn leaves scattered.</background>
<camera>Macro to 50mm, low angle at pumpkin level, shallow depth of field.</camera>
<lighting>Practical LED from inside the pumpkin plus cold blue twilight from overcast sky.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, slight grain.</output>
<negative>no cartoon ghost, no witch nearby, no kids in frame.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Better Homes and Gardens Halloween editorial staples: practical candle light plus twilight, pulp on the doorstep.
antiPatterns: Do not include a smiling human face in the carving. Disturbing smiles read better at small sizes.
Do not use warm studio lighting. Cold twilight is the genre anchor.

prompts.title: Thanksgiving table flat lay pack
prompts.when: You want a top-down holiday-table flat lay with turkey, sides, and warm neutral palette.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a food stylist composing a Thanksgiving table overhead shot.</role>
<task>Render a top-down flat lay of a Thanksgiving spread on a long farmhouse table.</task>
<subjects>Whole roast turkey on a wooden board as the centerpiece, surrounded by mashed potatoes, cranberry sauce, mac and cheese, green bean casserole, dinner rolls in a basket, and three pumpkin pies.</subjects>
<props>Brass candlesticks with ivory tapers, eucalyptus garland runner, linen napkins in muted mustard, ceramic stoneware in cream.</props>
<camera>Directly overhead, 24mm equivalent, full table in frame, no distortion.</camera>
<lighting>Soft window light from one side, no harsh shadows, slight glow from candles.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 1:1, photorealistic, magazine-grade food styling.</output>
<negative>no plastic cutlery, no microwaved look, no cartoon turkey, no Thanksgiving banner.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Bon Appetit and Food and Wine Thanksgiving cover tradition since 2010. Reference: https://www.bonappetit.com/.
antiPatterns: Do not include too many protein mains. One turkey, one ham optional.
Do not put text overlays on the image. Editorial food shots stand on their own.

prompts.title: New Year fireworks rooftop selfie pack
prompts.when: You want the subject at midnight on a rooftop with a city skyline and fireworks behind them.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a phone-photographer staging a New Year Eve rooftop selfie.</role>
<task>Render a selfie of the subject (or group of friends) on a rooftop at midnight with a city skyline and big-burst fireworks behind.</task>
<subject>Two or three friends, party attire, glasses of champagne raised, identities preserved.</subject>
<setting>Rooftop terrace with skyline view of {{city}}. Frosted rooftop edges, strings of warm fairy lights above, slightly foggy breath.</setting>
<camera>Front-facing phone camera, 9:16 vertical orientation, slight wide-angle. The subjects are lit primarily by screen glow plus occasional fireworks flare.</camera>
<lighting>Cool blue night, warm practical fairy lights, intermittent warm bursts from fireworks that wash across the foreground.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 9:16, photorealistic, slight motion blur on smoke trails.</output>
<negative>no text overlay counting down, no visible date stamp, no neon signs in frame.</negative>
notes: Pattern inspired by the viral 2024-2025 fireworks-selfie genre: champagne raised plus city skyline plus iPhone wide-angle perspective.
antiPatterns: Do not include fireworks that look computer-generated. Real bursts have asymmetric petals.
Do not pose the subjects parallel to camera. Three-quarter turn sells the selfie.

prompts.title: Valentine Day love letter stationery pack
prompts.when: You want a romantic flat-lay of a handwritten love letter on aged paper with dried rose petals.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a stationery photographer staging a romantic flat-lay.</role>
<task>Compose a top-down shot of a handwritten love letter on aged cotton paper, with dried rose petals, a wax seal, and a fountain pen.</task>
<subject>The letter is in soft graphite cursive, legible but stylized. Wax seal in burgundy with a personal monogram.</subject>
<props>Dried roses, a vintage brass key, a ribbon in dusty rose, a partial candle in a brass holder.</props>
<camera>50mm, directly overhead, soft focus falloff at corners.</camera>
<lighting>Warm window light from one side, candle flicker, slight grain.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 1:1, photorealistic, no watermark.</output>
<negative>no modern typeface, no ecommerce styling, no branded letterhead.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Rifle Paper Co and Pinterest 2024-2025 stationery trends (https://www.riflepaperco.com).
antiPatterns: Do not stack photo props in front of the letter. The letter is the hero.
Do not use modern calligraphy with brush pens. Vintage dip-pen nibs sell the genre.

prompts.title: Eid Mubarak formal portrait pack
prompts.when: You want the subject dressed in elegant Eid clothing with a crescent moon and lantern backdrop.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cultural portrait photographer capturing an Eid portrait session.</role>
<task>Render an elegant Eid portrait of the subject in traditional clothing with a thematic backdrop.</task>
<subject>Subject in {{traditional_attire: sherwani / abaya / thobe / kurta}}, with subtle metallic embroidery, identity preserved.</subject>
<backdrop>Photographic fabric backdrop with a crescent moon motif, gold lanterns strung at the top of the frame, soft falling floral petals.</backdrop>
<camera>85mm f/1.4, soft focus falloff.</camera>
<lighting>Warm key from camera-right, cool fill from below, slight rim from the lanterns.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, elegant cultural portrait.</output>
<negative>no text overlay (Eid Mubarak text handled by user in post), no inappropriate modern props.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the Eid portrait convention widely shared on Instagram around Eid al-Fitr and Eid al-Adha.
antiPatterns: Do not stack multiple props directly behind the subject. A clean backdrop with a top crescent reads stronger.
Do not include food in the portrait. Save food for a separate pack frame.

prompts.title: Diwali diyas and rangoli pack
prompts.when: You want a glowing Diwali scene with clay diyas, rangoli, and warm festive light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cultural still-life photographer staging a Diwali celebration image.</role>
<task>Render a warm, glowing scene of lit clay diyas arranged around a fresh rangoli at the entrance of a home.</task>
<subjects>Twenty or more diyas in clay, oil wicks lit, flames reflecting in a brass thali, rangoli in colored powders.</subjects>
<setting>Marble-floored foyer, brass bell at the door, marigold garland above the entrance, soft indoor glow from interior lights.</setting>
<camera>Low angle at 24mm, shallow depth, slight skew perspective for cinematic feel.</camera>
<lighting>Warm orange glow from diyas as the primary source. Marigold yellows reflect the floor.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, festival mood.</output>
<negative>no fireworks in this still, no people, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the cultural tradition of Diwali photography featured in BBC and National Geographic coverage of the festival of lights.
antiPatterns: Do not show electric candles. Diyas are clay with cotton wicks.
Do not include modern lanterns that overpower the diyas.

prompts.title: Lunar New Year red lantern street pack
prompts.when: You want a bustling Lunar New Year street scene draped in red lanterns and gold accents.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a street photographer covering a Lunar New Year night market.</role>
<task>Render a vibrant Lunar New Year street market scene with red lanterns hanging overhead and golden Year-of-{{animal}} decorations.</task>
<scene>Old-town street closed to cars, red lanterns strung in two rows above, gold animal cut-outs on lampposts, vendors on the right selling tanghulu and mandarin oranges, couples walking with the subject or friends in winter coats.</scene>
<lighting>Warm tungsten from lanterns, deep shadows between lights, slight haze from grilled skewers.</lighting>
<camera>35mm street-photo wide, eye-level, slight motion blur on passing pedestrians.</camera>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, vivid red and gold palette.</output>
<negative>no fireworks in this still, no text overlay beyond subtle signage.</negative>
notes: Pattern from cultural street photography traditions around CNY in China, Singapore, Malaysia, and Vietnam (Tet).
antiPatterns: Do not overload red. Add deep black shadows to anchor the red.
Do not pose subjects head-on. Stride-through-the-frame is the genre.

prompts.title: Christmas morning unwrapping video pack
prompts.when: You want a 15-second POV-style Christmas morning unwrapping clip with fireplace glow.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a family videographer capturing the Christmas-morning unwrap moment.</role>
<scene>Living room at sunrise, presents stacked under a tree with twinkle lights, fireplace on the right glowing.</scene>
<subject>Hands in frame only, no faces shown. Wrapping paper is torn off a wrapped box to reveal a velvet jewelry box, which is opened to reveal a {{gift}}.</subject>
<motion>Handheld POV, slight stabilization. Paper crinkles, fireplace pops, slight camera lift on the reveal of the gift.</motion>
<camera>16mm action camera perspective, mild wide-angle, slight warmth.</camera>
<lighting>Fireplace warm key, string-light twinkle, soft morning window.</lighting>
<audio>Paper crinkling, fire crackle, soft carol from a distant radio, gasp from off-screen family member.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 15 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no faces in frame, no logos on wrapping paper, no commercial staging.</negative>
notes: Pattern inspired by viral TikTok Christmas-morning POV reveal genre: hands plus unwrap plus close-up reveal of the gift.
antiPatterns: Do not show the subject face. POV hands preserve universality.
Do not loop the unwrap. One continuous paper tear sells the moment.

prompts.title: New Year countdown fireworks video pack
prompts.when: You want a 20-second cinematic New Year Eve countdown to midnight and the first firework burst.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a city cinematographer filming a Skyline New Year countdown.</role>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-8s): Slow push-in on a city skyline at 23:59, the moment before midnight. People gather on rooftops in the foreground.
Beat 2 (8-11s): Cut to a clock face counting down from 10 to 0 in tight close-up.
Beat 3 (11-15s): Cut to wide skyline, all clocks hit midnight, multiple fireworks erupt from different rooftops.
Beat 4 (15-20s): Tilt up the tallest firework for a slow grand finale, then pull focus to the city below.
</narrative_arc>
<camera>Mix of locked tripod, slow dolly, and crane-arm. Anamorphic flares on the city lights.</camera>
<lighting>Full dark, city practicals, blue moonlight, fireworks warm flashes.</lighting>
<audio>Building crowd roar, distant countdown voices, firework booms, music swells on the finale.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 20 seconds, photorealistic, cinematic.</output>
<negative>no text overlay, no logo, no branded signage on the buildings.</negative>
notes: Pattern from cinematic New Year broadcasts: Sky News, BBC, ABC. Multi-source fireworks across multiple rooftops is the genre signature.
antiPatterns: Do not put the same firework bursting twice. Variety across rooftops sells scale.
Do not run the clock countdown in real time. Compress to 3 seconds.

prompts.title: Halloween trick-or-treat walking clip pack
prompts.when: You want an 18-second POV walking trick-or-treat clip on a Halloween night street.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a videographer walking alongside trick-or-treaters on Halloween night.</role>
<scene>Suburban cul-de-sac on October 31, 6:30pm twilight. Jack-o-lanterns on porches, fake cobwebs, dry leaves on the sidewalk.</scene>
<subject>Group of kids and a parent in costumes, walking house to house. No clear face focus; chore crowd energy.</subject>
<motion>Handheld steadicam, walking pace. Lights come up as porches are approached; the camera dollies into a doorway as a candy bowl is held out.</motion>
<camera>24mm low eye level, slight grain.</camera>
<lighting>Streetlamp sodium orange, porch lights warm white, twilight blue ambient.</lighting>
<audio>Footsteps on dry leaves, distant doorbell, kids chanting trick or treat, low Halloween music.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 18 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no adult faces prominent, no scary clown characters, no kid walking alone.</negative>
notes: Pattern from viral Halloween-night POV reels on TikTok. Walking-pace steadicam plus porch entry anchors the genre.
antiPatterns: Do not stage jump cuts. Continuous walking pace sells the through-the-neighborhood feel.
Do not overload costumes. Mix of two or three styles reads cleanly.

prompts.title: Lunar New Year lion dance performance video pack
prompts.when: You want a 15-second dynamic lion dance performance shot under red lantern light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cultural event videographer capturing a Lunar New Year lion dance.</role>
<scene>Indoor temple or street stage, red and gold columns, hanging red lanterns, smoke from firecrackers still in the air.</scene>
<subject>Two dancers inside one red-and-gold lion costume, performing the leaf-eating sequence. Drummers to the side.</subject>
<motion>Camera sweeps low, rising with the lion as it leaps onto the seat. Final beat, the lion tosses the lettuce and the camera tilts up to catch the leaves falling into the crowd.</motion>
<camera>24mm gimbal-mounted, low tripod-to-rise motion.</camera>
<lighting>Warm tungsten from lanterns, red gels on stage edges, sparks of firecracker residue.</lighting>
<audio>Drumbeats, gong, cymbals, firecracker pop, crowd cheers on the final toss.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 15 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no Western background, no text overlay, no dragon co-performing.</negative>
notes: Lion-dance cinematography references Singapore and Hong Kong CNY event coverage (https://www.channelnewsasia.com).
antiPatterns: Do not skip the lettuce toss. The cai qing toss is the visual climax.
Do not crop the second dancer. Two pairs of legs inside the lion read as authentic.

prompts.title: Eid community prayer gathering video pack
prompts.when: You want a 20-second reverent video of an Eid al-Fitr morning prayer gathering in an open field.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a documentary videographer covering an Eid morning prayer.</role>
<scene>Large open prayer ground just after sunrise. Thousands of worshippers in rows facing qibla, white kufis and prayer caps visible, colorful traditional dress at the edges.</scene>
<motion>Locked-off wide drone-style overhead shot, slowly descending. Then cuts to ground level for the concluding Eid Mubarak hugs and embraces between families.</motion>
<camera>Drone descending plus 35mm ground handheld at the embrace beat.</camera>
<lighting>Early morning golden sun raking across the field from low right.</lighting>
<audio>Call to prayer (gentle, non-loud), footsteps, takbir chorus, joyful greetings at the close.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 20 seconds, photorealistic, reverent.</output>
<negative>no music, no drone too close to faces, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern aligned with documentary coverage of Eid prayers (Al Jazeera, BBC) prioritizing respectful framing and natural sound.
antiPatterns: Do not include a single visible face in tight focus during prayer. Wide respectful framing is required.
Do not use upbeat background music. Natural sound only is canon.

prompts.title: Tokyo Shibuya night street pack
prompts.when: You want the subject on the famous Shibuya scramble crossing at neon-lit night.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Tokyo travel photographer capturing the Shibuya crossing after midnight.</role>
<task>Render a cinematic night portrait of the subject in the Shibuya scramble crossing, identity preserved, surrounded by neon signage.</task>
<scene>Shibuya scramble crossing, light rain, wet asphalt reflecting magenta, cyan, and amber neon. Crowds crossing in long exposure blur behind the subject.</scene>
<subject>Subject in a long coat, holding a coffee cup, breath visible, three-quarter turned, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>24mm wide, eye-level, 1-second exposure effect so crowds blur into ghost streams while subject stays sharp.</camera>
<lighting>Neon signs as key lights, streetlamp warm fill, no fill flash.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, slight cinematic color grade.</output>
<negative>no text logo on the billboard, no famous landmark cut-out beyond the crossing geometry.</negative>
notes: Pattern adapted from youmind Travel Photo Edit pack (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/travel-photo-edit). Long exposure crowd blur is the genre signature.
antiPatterns: Do not include the Hachiko statue in this frame. Crossing only.
Do not show Tokyo Tower or skyline. The Shibuya neon bowl is the entire backdrop.

prompts.title: Tokyo kissaten window seat pack
prompts.when: You want the subject seated in a vintage Tokyo kissaten window seat with a hand-pour coffee.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Tokyo cafe lifestyle photographer.</role>
<task>Render a moody interior of a vintage Tokyo kissaten with the subject at the window seat.</task>
<scene>Old-school kissaten with wood paneling, brass fixtures, jazz vinyl on a turntable, framed Showa-era prints, hand-pour siphon coffee behind the bar, single window seat for the subject.</scene>
<subject>Subject in dark cashmere sweater, reading a paperback, half-finished siphon coffee on the table, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>50mm, eye-level, soft focus falloff to the coffee equipment.</camera>
<lighting>Soft window light filtering through lace curtains, warm tungsten from the bar lamps.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, moody analog vibe, slight grain.</output>
<negative>no english signage, no modern cafe furniture, no anime.</negative>
notes: Pattern based on Tokyo kissaten culture documented in Time Out Tokyo and Kyu coffee guides (https://www.timeout.com/tokyo).
antiPatterns: Do not include a barista in modern cafe attire. Apron and bow tie is the look.
Do not lean into hipster aesthetics. Kissaten is pre-1970.

prompts.title: NYC yellow cab street portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a candid NYC street shot with a yellow cab and steam from the subway grating.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a NYC street photographer in the Saul Leiter tradition.</role>
<task>Render a candid NYC street portrait of the subject crossing the street with a yellow cab in the frame, autumn light, steam from a subway grate.</task>
<scene>Manhattan cross street, late-afternoon autumn light, fire hydrant steam rising behind the subject, yellow cab stopping at the crosswalk, brick brownstones in the background.</scene>
<subject>Subject mid-stride in camel coat, scarf trailing, identity preserved through motion.</subject>
<camera>50mm candid street-photo perspective, f/5.6, mild motion on the steam.</camera>
<lighting>Warm autumn afternoon, long shadows, no flash.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, Saul Leiter saturated palette.</output>
<negative>no Hollywood NYC glam, no Times Square lights, no yellow NYC taxi lettering that screams Times Square.</negative>
notes: Pattern adapted from youmind NYC Tourist Instagram Grid (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/travel-photo-edit). Autumn fire hydrant steam is canonical Saul Leiter, NY, 1957.
antiPatterns: Do not include the Statue of Liberty, Empire State Building, or yellow NYC taxi lettering that screams Times Square.
Do not pose the subject looking at the camera. Mid-stride is the canon.

prompts.title: Paris cafe terrace travel pack
prompts.when: You want the subject at a sidewalk table of a classic Parisian cafe with espresso and croissant.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Paris travel editor shooting a sidewalk cafe scene.</role>
<task>Render a candid shot of the subject at a sidewalk table of a classic Haussmann-era Parisian cafe.</task>
<scene>Cafe terrace on Boulevard Saint-Germain, classic bistro chairs, woven seat, white linen napkin, espresso and croissant on the table, dog under the next chair, mild autumn wind.</scene>
<subject>Subject in a striped Breton top, hair moving in the wind, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>35mm f/2, eye-level, soft focus on passers-by.</camera>
<lighting>Soft overcast Parisian sky, even fill.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, muted editorial palette.</output>
<negative>no Eiffel Tower in frame, no Starbucks, no loud signage.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Ina Jarvela and Conde Nast Traveler French cafe editorials; the Haussmann bistro is the visual anchor.
antiPatterns: Do not put a beret on the subject. Cliches break the genre.
Do not include the Eiffel Tower. Place Vendome or Saint-Germain reads more authentically.

prompts.title: Rome Colosseum golden hour pack
prompts.when: You want the subject framed against the Colosseum at golden hour with empty streets.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Rome travel cinematographer setting up a 6am morning shot.</role>
<task>Render the subject on a clean, low-crowd morning in front of the Colosseum at sunrise.</task>
<scene>Wide shot of the Colosseum against a pastel pre-sunrise sky. Empty streets, only the subject and a single jogger in the distance.</scene>
<subject>Subject in a tailored wool coat, walking slowly toward the camera, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>35mm wide, eye-level, soft focus on the distant archways.</camera>
<lighting>Soft pre-sunrise rose and gold, no harsh shadows, slight rim from the building lit by first light.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, editorial color grade.</output>
<negative>no tour buses, no selfie stick, no modern cars in frame.</negative>
notes: Pattern inspired by youmind Cinematic Double Exposure Traveler (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/travel-photo-edit).
antiPatterns: Do not include American or Italian flag above the Colosseum. Keep the scene neutral.
Do not stack multiple figures. One subject, one distant jogger.

prompts.title: Iceland waterfall aerial travel pack
prompts.when: You want a drone-style aerial shot over an Icelandic waterfall with the subject as a small figure on the rim.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a drone photographer over Iceland south coast.</role>
<task>Render a high-angle aerial looking down at a tall Icelandic waterfall with the subject as a tiny figure on the cliff edge.</task>
<scene>Skogafoss-style waterfall plunging into a basalt-green pool, subject standing on the upper cliff, a thin trail of hikers visible above.</scene>
<subject>Subject is a tiny figure in a red rain shell, providing scale against the 60m waterfall.</subject>
<camera>Drone perspective, looking down at a 60-degree tilt, 24mm equivalent.</camera>
<lighting>Soft overcast with a patch of sun illuminating the falls.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, cool moss-and-stone palette with red pop.</output>
<negative>no drone shadow visible, no other people close to the subject, no rainbow if not compositionally right.</negative>
notes: Pattern adapted from Citizen of the Planet and World Photo Adventures Iceland drone aerial portfolios.
antiPatterns: Do not include a rainbow unless specifically requested. Overcast shooting rarely produces one.
Do not crop the cliff edge. The full drop is the genre anchor.

prompts.title: Sahara desert dune silhouette pack
prompts.when: You want the subject as a black silhouette on the ridge of a Sahara sand dune at sunrise.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a desert landscape photographer set up before sunrise in the Sahara.</role>
<task>Render a wide cinematic shot of the subject as a pure silhouette walking the dune ridge at golden hour.</task>
<scene>Vast Sahara dune ridge, fog of fine sand at the foot, two camels a hundred meters behind the subject, no footprints around except a single line behind.</scene>
<subject>Walking, traditional blue Sahraoui robe outlined against the rising sun.</subject>
<camera>Telephoto 100mm compression, subject small in the frame so the dune swells dominate.</camera>
<lighting>Sunrise from behind the subject, deep orange rim, foreground falls into pure shadow.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, deep contrast, slight grain.</output>
<negative>no text, no visible tent encampment, no quad bikes.</negative>
notes: Pattern from National Geographic and Steve McCurry Sahara features.
antiPatterns: Do not pose the subject mid-air or jumping. Walking is the genre.
Do not include the sun as a full disc behind the head. Off-center sun reads more cinematic.

prompts.title: African safari lion close-up pack
prompts.when: You want a tight close-up of a male lion on the savanna at golden hour.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a National Geographic wildlife photographer in the Maasai Mara.</role>
<task>Render a tight close-up portrait of a mature male lion lying on the savanna at golden hour.</task>
<subject>Mature male with full mane, scarred nose, calm gaze slightly off-camera, breathing slowly.</subject>
<setting>Flat-topped acacia tree in the background, savanna grasses, copy space on the right for a magazine layout.</setting>
<camera>Canon EF 600mm f/4, shallow depth, slight catchlight in the eyes.</camera>
<lighting>Direct golden hour from the left, deep amber coat highlights, eye shadow.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, fine detail on mane hairs.</output>
<negative>no text, no safari vehicle visible, no other predators competing.</negative>
notes: Pattern references the wildlife photojournalism canon: 600mm prime, shallow depth of field, single subject only.
antiPatterns: Do not include a kill or carcass. Calm pride is the visual subject.
Do not crop the mane. The full mane defines a mature male.

prompts.title: Mountain cabin dawn landscape pack
prompts.when: You want a wooden mountain cabin with smoke from the chimney at alpine dawn.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a wilderness landscape photographer for an outdoor brand.</role>
<task>Render a remote wooden cabin in the alpine dawn with the subject stepping outside with a coffee mug.</task>
<scene>Pine-forested mountain valley, snow-dusted peaks in the distance, single cabin with a warm lamp in the window, smoke from the chimney rising.</scene>
<subject>Subject in a chunky knit and beanie standing on the porch, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>24mm wide, slightly low at cabin level, vast peak in the upper third.</camera>
<lighting>Alpine pink and gold alpenglow from the east, lamp warm orange spilling onto the porch.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, mountain color palette.</output>
<negative>no other cabins visible, no power lines, no trail of footprints outside the cabin.</negative>
notes: Pattern adapted from Cabin Porn and Lonely Planet mountain-glamping features.
antiPatterns: Do not include modern construction details. Log cabin style is canon.
Do not place the cabin centered. Off-center with foreground pine reads stronger.

prompts.title: Tropical beach golden hour pack
prompts.when: You want the subject silhouetted walking along a tropical beach at sunset.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a tropical travel photographer at sunset.</role>
<task>Render the subject walking barefoot along a white-sand tropical beach at sunset, with palm trees and a catamaran in the distance.</task>
<scene>Curved bay with white sand, swaying coconut palms, teal water turning to amber under a low sun. Distant catamaran at the horizon.</scene>
<subject>Subject in flowing summer dress or linen shirt, holding sandals, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>35mm wide, low at subject hip, sunset just behind the subject shoulder.</camera>
<lighting>Sunset rim from behind, no fill, deep shadows under palms, glowing water.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, saturated tropical palette.</output>
<negative>no other people in foreground, no text overlay, no jet ski.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Travel and Leisure and Islands magazine travel cover standards.
antiPatterns: Do not include seashells in the foreground; they tend to look like AI fingerprints.
Do not show the sun fully visible. Off-frame sun is more flattering.

prompts.title: Tokyo Yokocho alley walk video pack
prompts.when: You want a 15-second POV walking through a narrow Tokyo Yokocho alley lit by paper lanterns.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a travel videographer walking into a Tokyo Yokocho alley at night.</role>
<scene>Narrow alleyway with vertical kanji signboards, paper lanterns glowing red and white, izakaya stools on the right, salarymen drinking, chef grilling yakitori.</scene>
<motion>POV walking at conversational pace, slight sway, shoulder-bumping a passerby and bouncing off. Smoke from the grill crosses the frame.</motion>
<camera>16mm action cam, slight handheld stabilization.</camera>
<lighting>Paper lantern warm orange dominates, neon kanji signs add accent, deep shadows between stools.</lighting>
<audio>Conversation Japanese murmur, yakitori grill sizzle, glass clinks, distant train crossing bell.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 15 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no english signage, no legible text on the signs beyond generic kanji placeholders, no Westerners.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Tokyo Alleyways docu-style vlogs (https://www.youtube.com/@tokyodirection).
antiPatterns: Do not stage jump cuts. Continuous walking reads as authentic.
Do not use modern pop music. Ambient sound is the genre.

prompts.title: Paris Seine river cruise video pack
prompts.when: You want a slow cinematic dolly shot from a boat on the Seine passing the Notre-Dame facade.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Paris travel cinematographer on the river.</role>
<scene>Late afternoon on the Seine, boat passing under Pont au Double, Notre-Dame facade visible at the right of frame as the boat glides by.</scene>
<motion>Camera locked on a slow gimbal drift, parallel to Notre-Dame, panning right as the boat advances.</motion>
<camera>50mm f/2.8, deep focus to keep Notre-Dame sharp, gentle cinematic motion.</camera>
<lighting>Late-afternoon sun on the stone facade, deep blue shadow on the river, soft gold reflection.</lighting>
<audio>Bateau-mouche engine low hum, distant accordion from the quay, distant boat whistle.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 12 seconds, photorealistic, cinematic.</output>
<negative>no tour buses, no selfie-takers, no visible modern logo on the boat.</negative>
notes: Pattern from cinematic travel reels on the Seine: Conde Nast Traveler, AFAR.
antiPatterns: Do not include the Eiffel Tower from this angle. The Notre-Dame focus is the genre.
Do not let the boat wake disturb the surface. Seine at this stretch is calm.

prompts.title: Iceland glacier aerial drone video pack
prompts.when: You want a 15-second drone aerial pulling back from a blue-ice glacier cave to reveal the full ice cap.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a drone cinematographer over Vatnajokull glacier.</role>
<scene>Inside a glacier ice cave with translucent blue walls. Drone pulls straight back out through the cave mouth to reveal the larger white ice cap and a distant mountain.</scene>
<motion>Smooth drone pull-back, ascending as it exits the cave, slight roll to reveal scale.</motion>
<camera>Drone with 24mm equivalent, NO FPV whip-pan, slow and cinematic.</camera>
<lighting>Cool blue from ice refraction, bright overcast sky reveal on exit.</lighting>
<audio>Low wind, distant glacial water dripping, faint helicopter-style rotation.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 15 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no other people, no contrasty shadows, no logo overlays, no bold saturation.</negative>
notes: Drone pull-back from inside an ice cave to exterior is an Iceland signature shot popularized by Colin Hutton and OMM Iceland cinematographers.
antiPatterns: Do not whip-pan. Smooth pull-back is the only acceptable motion.
Do not oversaturate the blue ice. Natural cool tone is the genre.

prompts.title: African safari jeep game drive video pack
prompts.when: You want a 20-second jeep game-drive clip spotting a leopard in an acacia tree.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a safari guide filming a leopard sighting from a parked Toyota Land Cruiser.</role>
<scene>Savanna grass with one umbrella acacia, a leopard draped on a horizontal branch, safari jeep in the foreground, three tourists on the roof, guide pointing.</scene>
<motion>Locked camera from the jeep roof, gently pivoting as the leopard shifts on the branch. 600mm equivalent compression.</motion>
<camera>Canon 600mm f/4 on a gimbal head, very shallow depth, gentle pan.</camera>
<lighting>Soft late-afternoon light, the leopard spots catch rim light from the west.</lighting>
<audio>Savanna birds, light wind, whispered guide voice, camera click of the tourists.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 20 seconds, photorealistic, undisturbed wildlife aesthetic.</output>
<negative>no other vehicles crowding the scene, no engine noise, no tourists raising their voices.</negative>
notes: Pattern from BBC Earth and National Geographic safari day-in-the-life episodes. Quiet observation is the genre.
antiPatterns: Do not zoom digital, hard-cut instead. Optical compression only.
Do not include safari lodge tents. Pure bushveld is the genre.

prompts.title: Mountain lake sunrise timelapse video pack
prompts.when: You want a 25-second hyperlapse over an alpine lake from pre-dawn to first sun hitting the peaks.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a timelapse cinematographer at an alpine lake.</role>
<scene>Pre-dawn blue hour lake reflecting dark granite peaks. Sky shifts to pink and gold. First sun catches the highest peak, then descends the slope. Mist lifts off the lake surface.</scene>
<motion>Locked tripod, timelapse showing about 25 minutes compressed into 25 seconds. Sky shifts from indigo to magenta to gold. Stars fade. Mist lifts. First light rolls down.</motion>
<camera>Locked tripod 24mm, still camera, no motion during the shot.</camera>
<lighting>Pre-dawn blue (cold), then alpenglow (warm), then sunlit rocks (mid-tone).</lighting>
<audio>Soft ambient dawn chorus, single duck call, water lapping.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, timelapse 24fps, 25 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no people, no boats, no modern structures.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Alpenglow timelapse canon popularized by Nicolaus Wegner and Eric Hanson.
antiPatterns: Do not include a moon overhead. Lunar alpenglow confuses the timeline.
Do not stack multiple lakes. One lake, one peak.

prompts.title: Tonkotsu ramen bowl overhead pack
prompts.when: You want a steamy overhead shot of a tonkotsu ramen bowl with chopsticks mid-lift.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a food photographer staging a ramen editorial.</role>
<task>Render an overhead shot of a steaming tonkotsu ramen bowl with chopsticks mid-lift of noodles.</task>
<scene>Dark ceramic bowl on a wooden board, cloudy pork-bone broth, chashu slices fanned on top, ajitama egg halved, scallion, kikurage, black garlic oil droplets, slightly wilted red ginger mound center.</scene>
<camera>Directly overhead, 50mm, slight steam haze above the bowl.</camera>
<lighting>Soft directional from upper right, a single specular highlight on the broth.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 1:1, photorealistic, magazine-grade food styling.</output>
<negative>no western ramen, no chopsticks laid next to bowl, no logo, no text.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Eater and Bon Appetit ramen features: chashu fan is the genre anchor.
antiPatterns: Do not include a fork alongside. Chopsticks only.
Do not over-garnish. The dozen ingredient limit keeps it readable.

prompts.title: Tokyo sushi chef counter pack
prompts.when: You want a Tokyo sushiya counter scene: chef hands, single nigiri, wasabi brush.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Tokyo food photographer at a counter sushiya.</role>
<task>Render a counter-side scene of a sushi chef hands placing a piece of otoro nigiri in front of the camera.</task>
<scene>Hinoki wood counter, simple ceramic plate, single piece of otoro nigiri, dab of fresh wasabi, a hint of pickled ginger to the side. Chef hands visible, white towel over the shoulder.</scene>
<camera>Macro-lens eye-level across the counter, shallow depth of field.</camera>
<lighting>Soft warm key from above the chef station, no flash.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, restrained food styling.</output>
<negative>no western sushi roll, no chopsticks, no logo.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Jiro Ono documentary imagery: minimalism, hands in frame, single piece focus (https://www.netflix.com/jiro-dreams-of-sushi).
antiPatterns: Do not include soy sauce in the frame unless a small dish. Counter hygiene is part of the genre.
Do not use a marble bar. Hinoki is canonical.

prompts.title: Napoli wood-fired pizza pack
prompts.when: You want a classic Margherita just out of a wood-fired oven in Naples.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an Italian food photographer in Naples.</role>
<task>Render a classic Margherita pizza on a wooden peel, just pulled from a wood-fired oven.</task>
<scene>Rustic kitchen in Naples, dough with leopard-spotted cornicione, fresh fior di latte, San Marzano tomato in three stripes, basil leaves, drizzle of olive oil, slight steam, charred oven mouth in the background.</scene>
<camera>35mm, slightly angled top-down, shallow depth of field.</camera>
<lighting>Warm key from oven glow, dim warm ambient otherwise.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, Italian editorial palette.</output>
<negative>no pineapple, no stuffed crust, no American-style cheese pull.</negative>
notes: Pattern reflects Associazione Verace Pizza Napoletana standards: leopard-spotted cornicione, fior di latte mozzarella.
antiPatterns: Do not include pineapple or other controversial toppings. Margherita canon.
Do not show the cook face-on. Wood-fired oven glow is the scene.

prompts.title: Pour-over coffee ritual pack
prompts.when: You want a still life of a hand-pour coffee ritual in a bright morning kitchen.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a specialty coffee photographer at home in the morning.</role>
<task>Render a still life of a single-cup pour-over in progress on a sunlit kitchen counter.</task>
<scene>Ceramic Hario V60 dripper on a carafe, scale underneath, kettle in mid-pour from an off-frame hand, two cups set to the side, a v60 filter cone ready, whole bean bag open, fresh ground coffee in the hopper.</scene>
<camera>35mm, eye-level, slight shallow depth on the kettle steam.</camera>
<lighting>Direct morning window light, sharp shadows on the counter, no flash.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, warm editorial palette.</output>
<negative>no espresso machine, no milk pitcher, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Sprudge and Perfect Daily Grind coffee photo essays.
antiPatterns: Do not include a kettle with a curly cord. Stout gooseneck is canonical.
Do not stack the brand name on the bean bag. Generic bag works.

prompts.title: Fine dining tasting menu plate pack
prompts.when: You want an editorial plated dish at fine dining standard: smears, dots, microgreens.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Michelin-starred food photographer.</role>
<task>Render an editorial finished-plate shot of a course from a tasting menu.</task>
<scene>Single off-white ceramic plate on a dark linen napkin, a few precise smears and dots of sauce, microgreens perched, a protein component (torched fish, seared venison, or cured shellfish) centered.</scene>
<camera>90mm macro perspective, slightly angled top-down, shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Soft window light from one side, no flash, clean negative space.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, restrained palette.</output>
<negative>no garnish overkill, no gold leaf, no smoking effect, no logo.</negative>
notes: Pattern aligns with Michelin Guide culinary photography standards.
antiPatterns: Do not crowd the plate. Negative space is half the genre.
Do not include the chef. The plate is the protagonist.

prompts.title: Asian street food night market pack
prompts.when: You want a vibrant night-market street food stall scene with skewers, smoke, and lanterns.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a street food photographer at a Southeast Asian night market.</role>
<task>Render a vibrant night-market vendor scene at twilight: skewers on charcoal, smoke rising, paper lanterns overhead.</task>
<scene>Stall with charcoal grill, twenty satay skewers fanned out, sauce pot in the middle, plastic stools around, paper lanterns and Christmas-light strands overhead, motorbikes parked behind.</scene>
<camera>35mm, eye-level, slight motion in the smoke.</camera>
<lighting>Charcoal orange under-key, lantern warm tungsten on top, deep shadows behind.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, vivid warm palette.</output>
<negative>no logos, no english signage, no Western tourist crowds.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Anthony Bourdain street food features; southeast Asia night markets canon.
antiPatterns: Do not include plastic forks on skewers. Bamboo only.
Do not pose the vendor looking at camera. Vendors work.

prompts.title: Sourdough bread bakery loaf pack
prompts.when: You want a rustic sourdough loaf cooling on a wooden board in a bakery interior.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a bakery lifestyle photographer.</role>
<task>Render a freshly baked sourdough boule on a wooden cooling board in a small bakery.</task>
<scene>Wood-fired deck oven in the background with a faint glow, a basket of mixed loaves, scoring pattern visible on top of the boule, light dusting of flour, ceramic crock of olive oil.</scene>
<camera>50mm, slightly low at the loaf level, shallow depth on the oven.</camera>
<lighting>Warm from oven glow, soft daylight from a side window.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, warm bakery palette.</output>
<negative>no knife cuts into the loaf, no plate, no logo.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Tartine Bakery and Bread Bakers Guild editorial features.
antiPatterns: Do not include sliced bread visible cross-section. Whole boule is the genre.
Do not include cardboard boxes or wire racks. Rustic is the genre.

prompts.title: Matcha cafe aesthetic pack
prompts.when: You want a minimalist overhead of a matcha latte and matcha dessert on a stone table.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a minimalist cafe photographer.</role>
<task>Render an overhead still life of a matcha latte and a matcha dessert on a clean stone table.</task>
<scene>White ceramic bowl of whisked matcha latte with a bamboo chasen beside it; small square of matcha opera cake on a slab of dark stone.</scene>
<camera>Directly overhead 35mm, sharp across both items.</camera>
<lighting>Diffused north-facing window light, no harsh shadows.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 1:1, photorealistic, muted green and cream palette.</output>
<negative>no milk alternative branding, no latte art text, no logo.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Arabica and Sasaeru matcha cafe editorial work.
antiPatterns: Do not add latte art. Plain matcha is the genre.
Do not include a third item. Two is balanced.

prompts.title: Charcuterie and cheese board pack
prompts.when: You want a curated cheese and charcuterie board photographed overhead with a glass of wine in frame.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a food stylist composing a charcuterie board for a magazine.</role>
<task>Render an overhead shot of a curated cheese board with wines and accompaniments.</task>
<scene>Wooden plank with three cheeses (aged cheddar, soft brie, blue), cured meats folded, fig jam in a small bowl, mixed olives, marcona almonds, honeycomb slice, dried apricots, a baguette half, sprigs of rosemary.</scene>
<props>Wine glass with red, a small carafe of water.</props>
<camera>50mm overhead, full board in frame.</camera>
<lighting>Soft window light, no flash.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 1:1, photorealistic, food editorial palette.</output>
<negative>no plastic, no branded labels, no decorative non-food elements.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Half Baked Harvest and Epicurious charcuterie features.
antiPatterns: Do not over-stuff the board. Negative wood shows in every quadrant.
Do not include bread that is sliced. Tear is more rustic.

prompts.title: Dim sum bamboo steamer stack pack
prompts.when: You want a tall stack of bamboo steamers with steam rising at a dim sum table.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Cantonese dim sum photographer.</role>
<task>Render a tall bamboo steamer stack with steam rising, at a Hong Kong dim sum table.</task>
<scene>Three bamboo steamers stacked, the top one open revealing har gow and siu mai, steam rising, classic red teapot to the side, white porcelain chopstick rests, mild chatter of the yum cha context.</scene>
<camera>35mm eye-level, slight soft focus on the steam.</camera>
<lighting>Soft overhead canopy lighting plus natural window light, warm tones.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, yum cha editorial palette.</output>
<negative>no English on teapot, no logos, no Westerner hands in frame.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Time Out Hong Kong dim sum features; yum cha morning tea is canonical.
antiPatterns: Do not include fortune cookies. Those are American Chinese.
Do not stack more than three steamers; four reads as a photo trick.

prompts.title: Ramen noodle pull video pack
prompts.when: You want an 8-second slo-mo noodle-pull clip from the bowl to the chopsticks.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a ramen food cinematographer.</role>
<scene>Overhead bowl of tonkotsu ramen, chopsticks enter and pull a generous bundle of noodles upward, steam rising.</scene>
<motion>Chopsticks dive into the broth, twist, lift slowly, trailing noodles stretch up. The camera is locked.</motion>
<camera>Locked overhead 50mm, 60fps for slow motion.</camera>
<lighting>Soft key from upper right, broth specular.</lighting>
<audio>Slurp sound of noodles lifting, broth dripping.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 60fps, 8 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no hands visible, no english on-screen, no logo.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Itadakimasu and Ramen Beast viral noodle-pull videos; the chopstick action is the genre.
antiPatterns: Do not show chopsticks breaking the noodles. Continuous strand sells the moment.
Do not include a fork alongside. Chopsticks only.

prompts.title: Coffee pour-over loop video pack
prompts.when: You want a 12-second loopable top-down clip of a slow pour-over coffee ritual.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a coffee videographer setting up a hypnotic pour-over loop.</role>
<scene>Hario V60 on a carafe, gooseneck kettle in a slow steady pour, coffee blooming, falling in a circle, scale showing weight rising on an LCD.</scene>
<motion>Static top-down camera, kettle circles slightly, water hits the grounds in concentric bloom.</motion>
<camera>50mm locked overhead.</camera>
<lighting>Diffused window light, no flash.</lighting>
<audio>Kettle hiss, water impact on coffee grounds, scale clicking.</audio>
<output>Aspect 1:1, 24fps, 12 seconds, photorealistic, loopable.</output>
<negative>no english labels, no logo, no barista face.</negative>
notes: Pattern from looped coffee videos that went viral on Instagram and TikTok; pour is the central anchor.
antiPatterns: Do not include steam from the dripper. Coffee is at serving temp, not steaming.
Do not allow hand movement that breaks the loop seam.

prompts.title: Wok stir-fry hei steam video pack
prompts.when: You want a 10-second close-up of wok cooking with flames and smoke (wok hei).
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Cantonese kitchen cinematographer capturing wok hei.</role>
<scene>Commercial kitchen, carbon-steel wok over jet burner, chef hand tossing vegetables and shrimp, flames licking up the wok sides, wok hei smoke rolling out.</scene>
<motion>Hand tosses ingredients, flame jets over the top, smoke rolls up and fills the top third of the frame.</motion>
<camera>35mm eye-level close on the wok, shallow depth on the chef hand.</camera>
<lighting>Flame is the key, dim ambient kitchen.</lighting>
<audio>Clattering wok, flame roar, chef breath.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 10 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no logo, no english subtitles, no plated food yet.</negative>
notes: Wok hei (breath of the wok) visual rule: flames licking up and smoke rolling out is the signature shot, popularized by Andrew Zimmern and Lee Kum Kee features.
antiPatterns: Do not place the wok on a domestic stove. Commercial jet burner is the genre.
Do not shoot from above. Side angle reads the flame.

prompts.title: Sushi chef hands assembly video pack
prompts.when: You want a 12-second loop of a sushi chef hands shaping rice and topping with fish.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a sushi-ya documentary cinematographer.</role>
<scene>Counter-side close on a sushi chef hands: shaping shari rice between fingers, dabbing wasabi, laying a slice of otoro over the top, finished nigiri set aside.</scene>
<motion>Quiet hand motion, gentle pad of the fish onto the rice, slight press. Loopable.</motion>
<camera>Macro 90mm, eye-level across the counter.</camera>
<lighting>Warm key from above the chef station, no flash.</lighting>
<audio>Quiet rice pad, knife on board, faint ocean sound.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 60fps, 12 seconds, photorealistic, loopable.</output>
<negative>no logo, no english signage, no soy sauce in frame.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Jiro Ono documentary loops and Sushi Zo TikTok aesthetics.
antiPatterns: Do not show the chef face. Hands only.
