Do not include background music. Chef station is quiet.

prompts.title: Bread oven-pull baking video pack
prompts.when: You want a 10-second clip pulling a tray of bread loaves from a wood-fired oven.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a bakery cinematographer.</role>
<scene>Wood-fired deck oven, baker peel pulling a tray of three sourdough loaves, steam rising, oven glow on the brick dome.</scene>
<motion>Peel slides into the oven, hooks the tray, smoothly draws out. Loaves sit steaming on the tray. Mild bounce of heat haze.</motion>
<camera>Locked 35mm at oven mouth height, slight depth on the loaves.</camera>
<lighting>Deep orange from the oven glow, dim ambient bakery.</lighting>
<audio>Peel sliding on brick, hiss of steam, baker sigh.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 10 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no hands holding bread, no branded oven, no logo.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Tartine and King Arthur baking reels; the oven-mouth shot is the climax.
antiPatterns: Do not cut before the loaves are fully visible on the peel.
Do not include the baker face in close-up. Profile only.

prompts.title: Streetwear outfit-of-the-day grid pack
prompts.when: You want a 3x3 grid of nine streetwear looks on the subject, each in a different urban location.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a streetwear editor shooting a 9-look OOTD grid.</role>
<task>Render a 3x3 grid of the same subject in nine different streetwear looks, each look in a different urban location within the same city.</task>
<subject>Identity preserved across all tiles. Same hair, same build.</subject>
<locations>
L1: Brutalist parking deck
L2: Vintage neon motel at dusk
L3: Skate plaza under overpass
L4: Subway platform with old tiles
L5: Little Tokyo alley with kanji signs
L6: Gas station forecourt
L7: Rooftop with downtown skyline
L8: Boombox wall mural
L9: Laundromat interior
</locations>
<outfits>
Each look alternates between archival Helmut Lang and Rick Owens, Stussy, JJJJound, vintage Carhartt, Aimé Leon Dore, Patagonia fleece, Nike ACG, Kapital, BAPE.
</outfits>
<camera>35mm to 50mm, consistent across tiles. Each tile is 9:16 vertical.</camera>
<lighting>Natural or available light only. No flash.</lighting>
<output>3x3 grid, 2048x2048, no border, no watermark.</output>
<negative>no anime, no logos other than generic streetwear labels, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Highsnobiety and Hypebeast OOTD grid conventions: 9 tiles, varied urban contexts, single subject consistency.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the consistency rules. Different faces across tiles breaks the pack.
Do not include casual luxury items in the same tile as workwear. Keep coherence.

prompts.title: Haute couture runway closing look pack
prompts.when: You want a runway closing look photo on the subject in a couture gown with spotlight.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Vogue runway photographer capturing the closing look.</role>
<task>Render the subject as the closing look of a haute couture show, walking a catwalk in a couture gown.</task>
<scene>Ornate gilded opera-house runway, mirrored walls, single spotlight on the subject, audience in deep shadow along the side.</scene>
<subject>Floor-length couture gown with hand-embroidered floral motifs, a tulle train trailing. Tiara in the hair, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>85mm telephoto, eye-level across the runway, subject approaching and filling more of the frame as she closes the show.</camera>
<lighting>Single hard spotlight from above, otherwise dark.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, editorial runway color.</output>
<negative>no text overlay, no music visualization, no painted-on background.</negative>
notes: Pattern reflects Vogue Runway closing-look conventions: single spotlight, dark audience, gown floating (https://www.vogue.com/fashion-shows).
antiPatterns: Do not show the gown from the back. Front three-quarter is canon.
Do not include the bow-taking gesture. That is the bridal convention.

prompts.title: 1970s vintage portrait film pack
prompts.when: You want a Kodak Portra-style 1970s portrait of the subject with period-accurate hair and clothing.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 1970s-era portrait photographer with Kodak Portra film.</role>
<task>Render a portrait of the subject as if shot on medium-format Kodak Portra 160 in 1974.</task>
<subject>Subject with feathered hair, sideburns if male or center-part if female, wide collar shirt, identity preserved through period styling. Age-appropriate makeup.</subject>
<setting>Den wallpaper, wicker chair, macrame wall hanging, brown-amber palette, slight cigarette haze.</setting>
<camera>Mamiya RZ67, Kodak Portra 160 film emulation, warm cast, slight grain.</camera>
<lighting>Tungsten key with window fill, slightly warm cross.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5 square format, photorealistic, film grain, warm color cast.</output>
<negative>no modern clothing, no contemporary hairstyle, no digital sharpness.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the resurgence of 70s film aesthetics on Pinterest 2024-2025: feathered hair, earthy palette, wicker.
antiPatterns: Do not go full disco. Quiet residential 70s reads better.
Do not use modern phone camera sharpness. Medium format softness is the genre.

prompts.title: 1980s vintage mall portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a mall-studio 80s portrait of the subject with big hair, braces, and a laser background.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 1985 mall portrait studio photographer.</role>
<task>Render a portrait of the subject as if shot in a mall studio with a laser-print backdrop and softbox lighting.</task>
<subject>Big voluminous hair, fluorescent fashion, maybe braces if specified, identity preserved through period facial structure.</subject>
<setting>Painted laser-print backdrop of misty mountains at sunset, softbox shadows on the studio floor, mall corridor visible at the frame edge.</setting>
<camera>Olympus mju with flash, slight redeye, slight softness.</camera>
<lighting>Harsh direct flash, evenly lit, minimal modeling.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, period color grade, slight flash hot spot.</output>
<negative>no modern backgrounds, no contemporary fashion, no bokeh.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the popular 80s mall-portrait nostalgia render: Olan Mills style with laser backdrop.
antiPatterns: Do not overdo the braces or the hair. Anchor authenticity, not costume.
Do not light the scene with film-noir contrast. Flat flash is the genre.

prompts.title: 1990s disposable-camera party pack
prompts.when: You want a 1990s disposable-camera party flash photo of the subject and friends.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 1996 party photographer with a Kodak Fun Saver.</role>
<task>Render a candid 1990s house-party photo of the subject and friends taken with a disposable camera with flash.</task>
<scene>Living room with carpet, lava lamp, posters on the wall, friends in 90s knit and overalls, slight drinks in hand.</scene>
<camera>Kodak Fun Saver 35mm with flash, redeye, slight double-vision blur from the flash recycling.</camera>
<lighting>Direct harsh flash as key, no ambient fill.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, film grain, warm cast.</output>
<negative>no modern clothing, no smartphone, no instagram filter.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the disposable-camera aesthetic revival: harsh flash, redeye, slight motion.
antiPatterns: Do not stage the group facing the camera. Subject off-center sells candid.
Do not include clean white walls. Patterned wallpaper is the genre.

prompts.title: Y2K glitter butterfly portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a 2001-era glitter-tattoo butterfly portrait of the subject with rhinestone phone charm.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 2001 teen magazine portrait photographer.</role>
<task>Render a Y2K teen-magazine portrait of the subject with glitter butterfly tattoos, frosted lipstick, and a rhinestone flip-phone charm.</task>
<subject>Identity preserved, glossy lip gloss, butterfly glitter tattoos on the cheek and collarbone, frosted eye shadow.</subject>
<setting>Hot-pink seamless paper, fake rainbow stars, a small glittering heart sticker on the corner of the photo.</setting>
<camera>35mm with point flash, slight oversaturation.</camera>
<lighting>Cool pink from the front, hair spotlight from behind.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, slightly oversaturated, light leak.</output>
<negative>no modern smartphone, no social media handle, no contemporary fashion.</negative>
notes: Y2K nostalgia pattern from Lucky Magazine and YM circa 2000-2002.
antiPatterns: Do not include denim minis with rhinestones. The butterfly tattoo alone is the genre.
Do not over-stylize. Slight oversaturation, not full filter.

prompts.title: Minimal fashion editorial pack
prompts.when: You want a minimal Comme des Garcons-style fashion editorial of the subject on a white seamless paper.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a fashion editorial photographer working for System Magazine.</role>
<task>Render a minimal, restrained fashion editorial of the subject on a white seamless paper.</task>
<subject>Single garment: oversized sculptural coat in {{color}}, hair slicked back, no jewelry, no makeup. Identity preserved.</subject>
<setting>Seamless white paper from floor to back wall, single shadow, light leak.</setting>
<camera>85mm, three-quarter standing pose, subject off-center to create negative space.</camera>
<lighting>Single softbox from upper-left, no fill, deep shadow.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, restrained palette of {{color}} and white only.</output>
<negative>no text, no other people, no clutter, no busy background.</negative>
notes: Pattern based on the Comme des Garcons and Jil Sander and The Row editorial mode: single garment, white seamless, restraint.
antiPatterns: Do not add a smile or expression. Flat expression is the genre.
Do not light the seamless evenly. Single softbox shadow is canonical.

prompts.title: Runway walk loop video pack
prompts.when: You want a 9-second loopable fashion runway walk of the subject in a given look.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a front-row fashion-show videographer capturing a runway walk.</role>
<scene>Minimal runway, beige walls, front-row silhouettes in deep shadow, the subject walking toward the camera in a {{garment}}.</scene>
<motion>The subject strong forward walk, skirt flowing, head steady, ends just before exiting frame; loopable.</motion>
<camera>50mm eye-level across the runway, 60fps for smooth motion.</camera>
<lighting>Single hard spotlight from above, otherwise dark.</lighting>
<audio>Footsteps on hard floor, single bass note cue at peak walk.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 60fps, 9 seconds, loopable.</output>
<negative>no music buildup, no title cards, no audience faces in close-up.</negative>
notes: Pattern from TikTok runway walks and Prada and Bottega Veneta show vertical captures.
antiPatterns: Do not shake the camera. Runway is locked.
Do not include audience applause. Footsteps and bass cue are enough.

prompts.title: Getting ready OOTD video pack
prompts.when: You want a 12-second getting-ready mirror-try-on sequence for an outfit-of-the-day.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a TikTok creator filming a quick getting-ready mirror try-on.</role>
<scene>Bedroom, ring light in front of a full-length mirror, the subject getting dressed into {{outfit}}.</scene>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-3s): Subject in base layer, holding the top.
Beat 2 (3-6s): Pulls top on, tucks.
Beat 3 (6-9s): Steps back into the mirror frame.
Beat 4 (9-12s): Holds a final pose, peace sign.
</narrative_arc>
<camera>Phone camera in tripod, the ring light visible in the mirror, slight phone-shake compression.</camera>
<lighting>Single ring light front, warm fill from a lamp off to the side.</lighting>
<audio>Trendy lo-fi loop, no voice.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 12 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no text overlay, no brand logos, no other people.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the established TikTok OOTD getting-ready format: 4 beats, ring-light visible, peace-sign close.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the ring light. The ring light reflection is the genre tell.
Do not add voice-over. Music only.

prompts.title: Thrift haul flat-lay video pack
prompts.when: You want a 14-second thrifted-haul flat-lay reveal with items being placed onto bedspread.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a thrift-flip videographer laying out a haul.</role>
<scene>Top-down view of a bed with a patterned bedspread, the subject hands placing thrifted items one by one onto it.</scene>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-3s): Bedspread empty.
Beat 2 (3-7s): Three to four garment items are placed, fanned.
Beat 3 (7-10s): Accessories added, jewelry, scarves, sunglasses.
Beat 4 (10-14s): Hands pull back to show the whole haul.
</narrative_arc>
<camera>Locked overhead phone camera on a tripod, slight natural daylight flicker.</camera>
<lighting>Soft window light, no flash.</lighting>
<audio>Lo-fi hip-hop, no voice, soft rustling of fabric.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 14 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no visible labels, no price tags, no other people.</negative>
notes: Pattern from YouTube thrift-flat-lay hauls: items placed one by one, ending in pulled-back reveal.
antiPatterns: Do not include the entire closet. Bounded bedspreads read stronger.
Do not crop the hands completely. Hands belong in the frame as agents.

prompts.title: Studio dog portrait bokeh pack
prompts.when: You want a studio-style dog portrait with creamy bokeh and catchlight in the eyes.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a pet studio portrait photographer.</role>
<task>Render a studio dog portrait of a {{breed}} with shallow depth of field and a catchlight.</task>
<subject>Single {{breed}} dog sitting attentively, ears forward, mouth slightly open, identity preserved through pattern and color.</subject>
<backdrop>Dark mossy green seamless paper with a soft vignette.</backdrop>
<camera>85mm f/1.2, eye-level with the dog, very shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Single softbox from upper-left, fill reflector camera-right, distinct catchlight in both eyes.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, fine fur detail.</output>
<negative>no human in frame, no other pets, no props other than the dog.</negative>
notes: Pattern from professional pet studio conventions: one softbox, one fill, dark seamless. Reference: Rachael Hale pet portraiture.
antiPatterns: Do not include toys or treats in the frame. Clean focus on the dog.
Do not light the seamless evenly. Vignette depth is the genre.

prompts.title: Cat celebrity magazine cover pack
prompts.when: You want the subject cat photographed as the cover star of an editorial magazine.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an editorial photographer prepping a cat magazine cover.</role>
<task>Render the cat subject as if it were a celebrity on the cover of a major editorial magazine.</task>
<subject>Cat with green eyes sitting on a velvet chaise, slightly turned, mid-meow, mouth slightly open. Identity preserved through coat pattern.</subject>
<setting>Velvet chaise in a studio, soft window light, a single red rose placed on the floor.</setting>
<camera>50mm, eye-level with the cat, shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Hard window from the left, fill from the right.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 2:3 magazine cover ratio, photorealistic, cover layout (no actual magazine).</output>
<negative>no cover text, no barcode, no tagline.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Catster and Modern Cat Magazine cover standards.
antiPatterns: Do not include cover text in this image. The cover layout is generated separately.
Do not include another animal in the frame.

prompts.title: Exotic pet monitor lizard studio pack
prompts.when: You want a studio portrait of a monitor lizard or other exotic pet in dramatic light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an exotic-animal photographer capturing a textured reptile subject.</role>
<task>Render a studio portrait of a {{species: savannah monitor / tegu / bearded dragon}} on a basalt rock against a fade.</task>
<subject>Subject coiled or perched, eyes forward, slightly forked tongue flicking in one frame.</subject>
<setting>Black slate or basalt rock, gradient charcoal seamless background.</setting>
<camera>85mm macro, eye-level with the lizard, soft focus falloff.</camera>
<lighting>Hard rim from upper-left, low fill on the textured scales.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, sharp scale detail.</output>
<negative>no second animal, no hands, no props.</negative>
notes: Pattern from exotic pet editorial work in Modern Reptile Magazine and BioWeb.
antiPatterns: Do not include the handler. Just the animal.
Do not flatten the texture. Scale detail is the genre.

prompts.title: African wildlife elephant matriarch pack
prompts.when: You want a tight portrait of an elephant matriarch in the African bush.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a wildlife photographer in the Okavango Delta.</role>
<task>Render a tight portrait of an elephant matriarch in golden-hour bush light.</task>
<subject>Older elephant matriarch, tusks worn, eye wrinkled with age, ear gently flapping, looking past the camera.</subject>
<setting>Savanna grass blurring into the back, distant baobab silhouette.</setting>
<camera>Canon 400mm f/2.8, shallow depth of field, catchlight in the eye.</camera>
<lighting>Late-afternoon golden backlight, fill from the open sky.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, fine skin wrinkle texture.</output>
<negative>no vehicles, no people, no fences, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the National Geographic wildlife canon: 400mm, shallow depth, single animal.
antiPatterns: Do not include calf in this frame. Matriarch alone is the genre.
Do not blow highlights on the grey skin.

prompts.title: Macro butterfly wing pattern pack
prompts.when: You want a macro shot of a butterfly wing with bokeh-ed greenery background.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a macro nature photographer.</role>
<task>Render a tight macro photo of a {{species: blue morpho / monarch / swallowtail}} perched on a flower with shallow DOF.</task>
<subject>Butterfly with closed wings revealing the underside pattern, perched on a zinnia, antennae forward.</subject>
<setting>Bokeh-ed greenery with another flower spot of color in the back.</setting>
<camera>180mm macro, f/5.6, soft focus on the antennae.</camera>
<lighting>Diffused overcast light with a soft spot highlight on the wing scales.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, fine wing scale detail.</output>
<negative>no second butterfly, no petals covering the wings.</negative>
notes: Pattern from macro nature photography canon: 180mm f/5.6, diffusion diffuser, perched subject.
antiPatterns: Do not crop the antennae. Antennae tell the viewer it is a living insect.
Do not over-sharpen. Macros breathe with slight softness.

prompts.title: Fantasy baby dragon portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a studio-style portrait of a baby dragon chick on a mossy perch.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a creature photographer capturing a freshly hatched dragon chick.</role>
<task>Render a portrait of a juvenile dragon emerging from a hatched egg on a mossy forest floor.</task>
<subject>Dragon chick with translucent wings still damp, eyes glowing amber, short ivory horns, soft down along the spine.</subject>
<setting>Mossy log, scattered eggshell pieces, faint golden steam rising from the egg membrane.</setting>
<camera>85mm macro, eye-level with the dragon, very shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Forest dappled light through canopy, soft warm rim from the egg interior glow.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, fine scale and down detail.</output>
<negative>no knights, no fire, no teeth, no menacing read.</negative>
notes: Pattern from creature-feature visual references (Life of Pi tiger cub lighting, How to Train Your Dragon character study).
antiPatterns: Do not include fire-breath. Newborn dragon reads as innocent.
Do not pose the dragon mid-roar. Quiet emergence reads better.

prompts.title: Mythical frost unicorn creature pack
prompts.when: You want an arctic-themed frost unicorn standing on a glacier with a moonlit sky.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a fantasy creature cinematographer capturing a frost unicorn in the Arctic.</role>
<task>Render a frost unicorn on a glacier under a cold moon, breath visible.</task>
<subject>Pale-blue unicorn with curling ice-horn, snow-dusted mane, reflective hooves.</subject>
<setting>Glacier crevasse, full cold moon, faint aurora on the horizon.</setting>
<camera>50mm, low at unicorn chest level, deep focus to the aurora.</camera>
<lighting>Cool blue moonlight key, faint warm aurora kicker.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic with subtle magical shimmer.</output>
<negative>no rainbow palette, no pink, no glitter.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the National Geographic Big Cat Week reimagined as creature-feature. Mythic realism rule: restraint over glitter.
antiPatterns: Do not over-render glitter. Cold clear light reads stronger.
Do not include a knight or princess.

prompts.title: Slow-mo dog shake drying video pack
prompts.when: You want a 6-second slo-mo of a wet dog shaking water off in dramatic light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a pet videographer capturing the iconic wet-dog shake.</role>
<scene>Wet golden retriever standing in shallow lake water, sun behind it rim-lighting the spray.</scene>
<motion>The dog pauses, then shakes its entire body, water droplets flying in a halo around its silhouette. Captured at 240fps for slow motion.</motion>
<camera>Locked 50mm eye-level with the dog, slight pre-shake anticipation.</camera>
<lighting>Backlight from a low sun behind the dog, fill from the surface reflection.</lighting>
<audio>At 240fps the audio is stretched. Quiet water flapping low end.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 120fps (slo-mo played back at 30), 6 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no handler visible, no other dogs, no text.</negative>
notes: Pattern from viral 2024-2025 wet-dog slo-mo reels on Reels and TikTok. Backlight halo is the genre anchor.
antiPatterns: Do not start the clip already shaking. Anticipation is the genre.
Do not underlight the dog. Backlight is the read.

prompts.title: Cat knock-off item video pack
prompts.when: You want an 8-second clip of a cat deliberately pushing an object off a table.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a cat videographer capturing the deliberate knock-off moment.</role>
<scene>Minimal interior, a wooden side table, a glass paperweight on the edge. The cat is on the floor looking up.</scene>
<motion>Cat leaps onto the table, looks directly at camera, slowly extends a paw, pushes the paperweight off. POV follows the falling object in real time.</motion>
<camera>Locked wide shot from a sofa level, then cuts to a floor-mounted slow-mo angle of the impact.</camera>
<lighting>Soft daylight, no flash.</lighting>
<audio>Paw pat, glass clink on the floor, cat jumps down, soft padding feet.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps (and a 2-second 120fps slow-mo insert), 8 seconds.</output>
<negative>no human hands, no other pets, no shattered object.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the classic viral cat-knocks-things-off genre; pacing builds the gag.
antiPatterns: Do not show the cat clearly misbehaving. Slow deliberation is the gag.
Do not film with shaky cam. Locked frame reads the intent.

prompts.title: Puppy play-bow loop video pack
prompts.when: You want a 9-second loopable clip of a puppy doing a play-bow over and over.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a pet videographer shooting a delightful loop of a puppy playing.</role>
<scene>Sunlit living room rug, golden retriever puppy facing camera, tail wagging.</scene>
<motion>Puppy plants front legs, drops chest to the floor in a play-bow, then bounces back up; looped three times with subtle variations. Final beat soft zoom into the eyes.</motion>
<camera>Locked 35mm at floor level, slight natural shake.</camera>
<lighting>Warm window light, soft shadows.</lighting>
<audio>Happy yips, gentle tail thumps on rug, ambient room tone.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 60fps, 9 seconds, photorealistic, loopable.</output>
<negative>no human hands, no other pets, no barking on audio.</negative>
notes: Pattern from viral Golden Retriever Daily channel and TikTok puppy play-bow loops.
antiPatterns: Do not let the puppy leave the rug. Limited action space is the genre.
Do not rapid-cut. Three repetitions is the sweet spot.

prompts.title: MS Paint kid drawing redraw pack
prompts.when: You want a redraw of a reference image as a clumsy child or MS-Paint doodle for meme / social posts.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a chaotic kid-doodle artist working in MS Paint circa 2003.</role>
<task>Redraw the reference image as if a 7-year-old drew it in MS Paint in 2003 during math class.</task>
<style>White background, default 1-pixel mouse line, fill bucket color fills that overshoot the lines, classic MS Paint tools (line, brush, fill, eraser). Proportions hilariously wrong. Eyes are two black dots, mouth is one horizontal line.</style>
<quality_anti>Intentionally ugly. Lopsided circles. Lines drawn with the mouse in short uncertain strokes. Colors outside the lines. A potato head instead of a face.</quality_anti>
<output>Square aspect 1:1, exactly the look of a screen-grab of MS Paint.</output>
<negative>no polished illustration, no AI perfection, no detailed shading, no modern paint app.</negative>
notes: Pattern adapted directly from the youmind MS Paint Redraw Pack (https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/ms-paint-style). Key is the quality_anti prompt that forces imperfection.
antiPatterns: Do not request any degree of competence. Skill is the joke.
Do not allow AI shading. Flat fills only.

prompts.title: Crayon kid-drawing style pack
prompts.when: You want a redraw of a reference image as if drawn with waxy kid crayons on printer paper.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 5-year-old with a 16-pack of Crayola crayons working on white printer paper.</role>
<task>Redraw the reference image as if drawn by a kindergarten kid with waxy crayons during nap-time.</task>
<style>Waxy crayon texture, visible crayon strokes going in one direction, color that is slightly off (purple sky, green grass). Faces simplified to roundish shapes. The sun in the corner has squiggly rays. A stick-figure family if people.</style>
<background>White printer paper with a slight off-white tint and a couple of accidental crayon smudges.</background>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic of crayon-on-paper texture, slight grain.</output>
<negative>no adult illustration quality, no digital polish, no shading gradients, no colored pencil.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the viral 5-year-old crayon drawing style popularized by libapi on X (5M views): https://youmind.com/prompts-pack/ms-paint-style.
antiPatterns: Do not use digital perfection. Crayon imperfection is the genre.
Do not draw adults with anatomical correctness. Stick figures and potatoes are the genre.

prompts.title: Polaroid dusty snapshot pack
prompts.when: You want a Polaroid-style photo of the subject with frame borders, dust, and light leak.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 1990s Polaroid instant-photo enthusiast.</role>
<task>Render the reference image as an authentic Polaroid instant photo with frame border and physical artifacts.</task>
<style>Polaroid 600 film character: slightly desaturated, soft focus, characteristic cyan cast in shadows. White bottom border with no text.</style>
<artifacts>Light leak from the top edge, faint dust specks, a soft chemical streak across one corner, possible double-exposure if specified.</artifacts>
<subject>Identity preserved with the period softness of instant film.</subject>
<camera>Polaroid SX-70 or 600 equivalent, point-and-shoot logic.</camera>
<output>Square aspect 1:1 with white frame border on the bottom 20 percent, photorealistic artifact rendering.</output>
<negative>no digital clean-up, no modern filter, no retouched skin.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the Polaroid-Aesthetic revival popularized by Impossible Project and Lomography; viral across Pinterest and X.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the white bottom border. The Polaroid border is the genre.
Do not over-sharpen. Soft focus is the genre.

prompts.title: 90s yearbook portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a 90s senior-yearbook style portrait of the subject with period lighting and background.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a school-yearbook photographer in 1994.</role>
<task>Render the subject as if photographed for a 1994 high-school senior yearbook.</task>
<style>Classic yearbook grade: torso-and-up pose, studio backdrop with a faded soft-blue cloud-painted gradient, softbox key and fill, period-appropriate hairstyle and clothing, identity preserved through bone structure.</style>
<lighting>Standard two-softbox portrait, slightly flat and even.</lighting>
<camera>Medium-format Hasselblad look, Kodak Ektar film emulation, period color grade.</camera>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, balanced period color.</output>
<negative>no modern background, no contemporary clothing, no retouched skin.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the late-90s yearbook canon: cloud-painted backdrop, two-softbox standard lighting, Ektar film.
antiPatterns: Do not go full studio drama. Yearbook reads even and flat.
Do not use modern clothing fabrics. Silk and rayon are canonical.

prompts.title: Yearbook signing day scene pack
prompts.when: You want a 2000s yearbook-signing-day classroom scene with hardcover books and pens.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a high-school documentary photographer in 2003 capturing yearbook signing day.</role>
<task>Render a warm scene of a high-school classroom during yearbook signing day.</task>
<scene>Rows of desks, students hunched over open hardcover yearbooks, multiple ink-pen colors visible, lockers lining the back wall, posters of bands and teen magazines, fluorescent classroom light.</scene>
<subjects>Teen students in early-2000s fashion (low-rise jeans, Von Dutch logos, frosted tips, Abercrombie polos), identities not required to be specific.</subjects>
<camera>35mm wide at standing eye-level, deep focus, slight grain.</camera>
<lighting>Overhead fluorescent key, window light from the right, warm tone.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, period-documentary palette.</output>
<negative>no smartphones, no laptops, no adult figures.</negative>
notes: Pattern from 2003-2005 yearbook-signing-day photo collection canon.
antiPatterns: Do not show students looking at phones. Paper yearbooks only.
Do not include non-period clothing. Y2K teen only.

prompts.title: Crime drama mugshot pack
prompts.when: You want a 1970s True-Crime style mugshot of the subject on a height chart.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 1970s crime-scene unit photographer.</role>
<task>Render the subject as a 1970s crime-mugshot complete with height chart and ink-stamped placard.</task>
<scene>Booking room, painted cinder-block back wall, a horizontal height chart ruler with inches, a black-and-white placard board held by the subject with date and booking number scribbled in chalk. Single overhead fluorescent key.</scene>
<subject>Front-facing, neutral expression, plain shirt, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>50mm press-photo, harsh fluorescent, slight grainy film.</camera>
<lighting>Hard direct overhead fluorescent, shadow under the brow and nose.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, monochrome-friendly grade.</output>
<negative>no smiling, no logo, no text outside the placard, no modern decor.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the recent viral true-crime mugshot render genre popularized in 2023-2024.
antiPatterns: Do not let the subject smile. Mugshots are neutral.
Do not add other props. Plain shirt and placard only.

prompts.title: Comic book cover subject hero pack
prompts.when: You want the subject as the cover star of a numbered comic-book issue with bold logo and price box.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a comic-book cover artist working issue number {{number}}.</role>
<task>Render the subject as the cover star of an indie comic-book issue.</task>
<subject>Subject in a dramatic cape-and-cowl pose, identity preserved in the bone structure. Bold chiaroscuro lighting on the jaw.</subject>
<cover_chrome>
- Marvel / DC-style logo in the upper third, leaving the subject portrait dominant.
- White corner box at lower-left with issue number {{n}} and a date.
- Caption bar at the bottom: a short hook text.
- Bold dated halftone background, action-burst graphic behind the subject.
</cover_chrome>
<style>Cel-shaded illustration, inking, flat color, halftone dots.</style>
<output>Aspect 2:3 comic-cover ratio, photorealistic illustration.</output>
<negative>no anime style, no modern minimal covers, no photorealism in place of illustration.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the comic-book cover recreation trend on Instagram and TikTok (2024-2025).
antiPatterns: Do not include a separate title. The user specifies it after generation.
Do not crowd the cover with character art. Subject portrait is the hero.

prompts.title: Subway stranger talking-head confessional pack
prompts.when: You want a 20-second subway-platform talking-head confessional in the style of viral street-confessional reels.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a street-confessional creator filming on a subway platform.</role>
<scene>Subway platform in late afternoon, the subject seated on a metal bench, behind them a train arrives pulling into the station.</scene>
<subject>Subject in casual jacket, identity preserved, looking slightly past camera as if confessing.</subject>
<motion>Locked 35mm at chest height. Subject speaks directly to camera for 12 seconds, then the train passes behind them in a 4-second blur, then subject delivers the closing line.</motion>
<camera>35mm f/2.8, slight natural shake.</camera>
<lighting>Mixed station tungsten and platform-edge blue neon rim.</lighting>
<audio>Ambient train arrival roar, then quiet platform tone, then subject voice-over preset in post.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 20 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no other people in the frame, no text overlay, no wifi branding.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the viral subway-platform confessional reel genre on TikTok.
antiPatterns: Do not break the train-passing beat. The train is the B-roll anchor.
Do not stage the subject fully frontal. Slight past-camera off-axis sells candid.

prompts.title: Restock pantry organization video pack
prompts.when: You want a 14-second top-down pantry-restock satisfying video with labeled bins.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a satisfying-cleanup creator filming a pantry restock.</role>
<scene>Top-down view of a clear pantry shelf with labeled glass jars and woven baskets. Hands restock items in a clean, deliberate order.</scene>
<motion>Static overhead camera. Each beat, a hand slides a jar of {{item}} into place: olive oil, pasta, rice, oats, dried beans, baking supplies. The final beat reveals the full organized shelf.</motion>
<camera>Locked overhead 35mm, slight flutter from a small fan.</camera>
<lighting>Soft warm light from above, no flash.</lighting>
<audio>Soft restocking clicks, low lo-fi loop.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 14 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no visible labels other than tasteful, no plastic bins, no clutter.</negative>
notes: Pattern from viral restock TikTok creators like @organizedbyalyssa and the Pantry by Marie Kondo collaboration.
antiPatterns: Do not fast-forward the restock. Slow deliberate placement is the genre.
Do not include the original messy state. Start mid-restock.

prompts.title: Cinematic glow-up transition video pack
prompts.when: You want a 10-second glow-up transition before-and-after clip with a cinematic drop.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a short-form creator filming a cinematic glow-up transition.</role>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-5s): Casual before frame, soft natural lighting, plain outfit, identity preserved.
Beat 2 (5-6s): Sharp whip-pan freeze with flash freeze exposing the subject mid-movement.
Beat 3 (6-10s): After frame: cinematic, sculpted lighting, full hair and makeup, styled outfit, confident pose.
</narrative_arc>
<camera>Locked handheld before, freeze-frame with digital flash, gimbal pushed in for the after.</camera>
<lighting>Soft flat before, hard rim with key+fillet after, slight bloom.</lighting>
<audio>Quiet ambience before, then a sharp bass drop on the freeze, then a hype track fade-in.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps, 10 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no text overlay counting down, no logo, no animation overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the established glow-up transition genre on TikTok and Reels: before-freeze-after with bass drop is the formula.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the freeze frame. The freeze is the pivot.
Do not under-light the after. Cinematic depth sells the reveal.

prompts.title: Studio Ghibli character tribute pack
prompts.when: You want the subject rendered as a Studio Ghibli-style anime character in a soft watercolor scene.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Studio Ghibli character designer working in watercolor.</role>
<task>Render the subject as a hand-painted Studio Ghibli anime character in a soft watercolor setting.</task>
<style>Soft cel-shaded anime with watercolor skies, hand-painted cloud wash, slight linework imperfection. Hayao Miyazaki era palette: faded greens, muted blues, creams.</style>
<subject>Anthropomorphic but not cartoonish: subject with eyes slightly larger than life, soft smile, in a {{scene: countryside / seaside / forest}}.</subject>
<scene>Mountains in mist, small cottage, a Totoro-shaped topiary optional, kites optional.</scene>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic illustration, watercolor texture.</output>
<negative>no modern urban setting, no exaggerated chibi proportions, no hard cel-shaded modern anime.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the surge of Ghibli-style portraits and profile-picture restyles that went viral in 2024-2025 (https://www.studioghibli.com.au/about-studio-ghibli).
antiPatterns: Do not push into modern anime style. Ghibli is the watercolor era.
Do not oversaturate. Faded pastels are canonical.

prompts.title: Wes Anderson symmetry tribute pack
prompts.when: You want a Wes Anderson-style symmetrical frame of the subject in a pastel color palette.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Wes Anderson cinematographer at an indie-film shoot.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a Wes Anderson-style symmetrical frame with strict palette and dead-center composition.</task>
<style>Perfectly centered subject. Pastel palette: dusty pink, muted teal, cream yellow, powder blue. Soft overhead key, no shadows. Flat staging.</style>
<subject>Identity preserved, wearing formal yet whimsical costume: a vintage {{outfit}} with mid-century color cues.</subject>
<scene>Symmetric interior: a hotel hallway, hotel lobby, library, or diner. Items carefully placed: a single mug, a pair of gloves, a postcard. No clutter.</scene>
<camera>Centered framing, slight wide-angle, eye-level, no camera tilt.</camera>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, Anderson palette.</output>
<negative>no handheld shake, no neon, no skew, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Wes Anderson visual canon: dead-center framing, symmetric staging, mapped-on pastel palette (Grand Budapest Hotel, Moonrise Kingdom, Asteroid City).
antiPatterns: Do not break the symmetry. Anderson is centered or nothing.
Do not use warm tungsten. Pastel overhead light only.

prompts.title: Wong Kar-wai Hong Kong step-print pack
prompts.when: You want a moody 1990s Hong Kong cinema frame of the subject in a narrow alley or corridor.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Wong Kar-wai cinematographer working on a 1994 Hong Kong film.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a 1994 Hong Kong cinema frame with step-print motion blur.</task>
<style>Rich saturated color shifts between cyan, magenta, and yellow under practical lighting. Step-print motion blur on the edges. Crooked framing tilted 3 degrees.</style>
<subject>Identity preserved, expression melancholic, lit cigarette optional, in tight trousers and rolled sleeves.</subject>
<scene>Hong Kong corridor or rain-soaked Mong Kok street. Red and green practical signs bleed into one another. A passing figure crosses in the foreground with deliberate motion blur.</scene>
<camera>35mm with slight wide and slight tilt, cinematic depth.</camera>
<lighting>Hard practical key (green pharmacy sign or red lanterns), magenta kicker.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, heavy color grade.</output>
<negative>no soft pastels, no modern neon, no symmetrical framing.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Wong Kar-wai visual canon: Chungking Express, Fallen Angels, In the Mood for Love (https://www.criterion.com/current/posts/6041-wong-kar-wai).
antiPatterns: Do not apply pastel. Wong Kar-wai is color-saturated, not pastel.
Do not center the subject. Crooked framing is canonical.

prompts.title: Kubrick one-point perspective tribute pack
prompts.when: You want a Kubrick one-point perspective shot of the subject down a long corridor.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Stanley Kubrick cinematographer setting up a corridor shot.</role>
<task>Render the subject down a long corridor in a Kubrick one-point perspective.</task>
<style>Strict one-point perspective. Geometric precision. The walls, floor, and ceiling converge on a single vanishing point behind the subject.</style>
<subject>The subject stands at the end of the corridor, identity preserved. Stiff posture, neutral expression, 70s wool suit in muted brown or grey.</subject>
<scene>Long interior corridor, polished floor, minimalist walls, halogen recess lighting, end-lit by a single warm source.</scene>
<camera>Locked tripod, eye-level, never handheld. 35mm with stop-deep focus so the corridor converges to the subject.</camera>
<lighting>Single light source at the corridor far end, soft fill from above.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, Kubrick color precision.</output>
<negative>no action, no wide angle distortion, no multiple camera movements, no text.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Stanley Kubrick visual canon: The Shining corridor, A Clockwork Orange Droog hallway, Barry Lyndon candlelit room.
antiPatterns: Do not break the perspective with off-center framing.
Do not use digital color grading. Film print emulation only.

prompts.title: Nolan IMAX tribute portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a Christopher Nolan-style IMAX portrait with a recognizable large-scale environment.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Christopher Nolan IMAX cinematographer.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a Nolan-style IMAX frame, scale-emphasizing environment.</task>
<style>Large-format sharpness top to bottom. Cool teal-and-amber palette. Rectilinear geometry dominant. Little lens distortion.</style>
<subject>The subject stands in lower third of the frame, identity preserved, in muted modern attire, small against an architectural gigastructure.</subject>
<scene>A recognizable environment: brutalist stairwell, airport concourse, modernist library hall, or space-station airlock.</scene>
<camera>65mm equivalent, 1.78:1 close to square, deep focus across the entire frame.</camera>
<lighting>Practical sources: window light, fluorescent panels, sodium-vapor lamps.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5 (compositionally cinematic), photorealistic, IMAX-grade detail.</output>
<negative>no handheld camera, no grit, no telephoto compression.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Christopher Nolan visual canon: Interstellar, Tenet, Oppenheimer (large-format deep focus, architecture as antagonist).
antiPatterns: Do not crop the architecture. Nolan needs scale to read.
Do not introduce warm pastel tones. Teal-and-amber only.

prompts.title: Superhero movie poster tribute pack
prompts.when: You want the subject rendered as a superhero in cinematic poster format with dramatic light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a superhero film poster artist for a 2024 Marvel-DC cycle.</role>
<task>Render the subject as a superhero in a theatrical poster composition.</task>
<style>Cinematic poster format with strong rim light and atmosphere. Subject fills the lower two thirds, sky or cityscape behind.</style>
<subject>Cape or tech-armor optional, mask optional, identity preserved through jawline and eye shape. Action pose: forward step with one arm slightly back.</subject>
<scene>City skyline or stormy alien planet backdrop. Smoke, sparks, or atmospheric particulate. Lens flare from a single hard light source.</scene>
<camera>Slight low angle to make the subject heroic, 35mm.</camera>
<lighting>Strong rim from above-right, orange-and-blue hero palette.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 2:3, photorealistic poster print-ready.</output>
<negative>no animated Pixar style, no Halloween costume read, no text or title.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Marvel and DC poster canon: hero in lower two thirds, dramatic rim, atmospheric smoke.
antiPatterns: Do not include title typography. Layered in post.
Do not let the cape obscure the face. Hero face is the genre.

prompts.title: Anime shonen battle still tribute pack
prompts.when: You want an anime shonen battle still of the subject in a dynamic pose with speed lines.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 90s shonen anime key animator capturing a battle peak moment.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a 90s shonen-anime key animation pose.</task>
<style>Hand-drawn cel shading. Visible speed lines. Manga-style halftone shading on the impact. Background uses gradient sky.</style>
<subject>In mid-action, fist forward, expression intense, identity preserved in the hair and silhouette.</subject>
<scene>Destroyed city block or training dojo. Dust and impact ripples.</scene>
<camera>Three-quarter angle, slight Dutch tilt, dynamic.</camera>
<lighting>High contrast cel lighting, hard shadow on the back of the subject.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic illustration, bold linework.</output>
<negative>no moe style, no modern CG anime, no pastel, no western comic style.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the canonical shonen visual style: Dragon Ball Z, Naruto, One Piece (Toei Animation era palette, hand-drawn linework).
antiPatterns: Do not add CGI rendered backgrounds. Hand-painted still only.
Do not include multiple villains. Single focus subject.

prompts.title: Ghibli-style train arrival video pack
prompts.when: You want an 18-second Ghibli-style anime clip of a small train arriving at a countryside station.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Studio Ghibli key animator working on a countryside-train scene.</role>
<scene>Single-track countryside station at golden hour. Cat sleeping on a bench, kettle steaming on the platform, small green train approaching from the distance.</scene>
<motion>Locked camera. Train approaches on the tracks, slows, halts. Doors open. Smoke from the chimney lingers. Cat stretches. Loopable.</motion>
<camera>35mm at platform level, no handheld shake.</camera>
<lighting>Golden hour warm with a hint of haze, watercolor cloud wash.</lighting>
<audio>Train horn approaching, mechanical brakes hiss, ambient field cicadas.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 18 seconds, hand-drawn Ghibli style.</output>
<negative>no modern railway, no anime mecha, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Studio Ghibli transportation moments: Spirited Away train scenes, My Neighbor Totoro cat-bus (https://www.studioghibli.com.au).
antiPatterns: Do not use cel-shaded modern anime style. Ghibli watercolor period is the genre.
Do not include a passenger disembarking scene. Train arrival alone.

prompts.title: Superhero climactic stance video pack
prompts.when: You want a 12-second cinematic superhero climactic-stance video with wind and slow motion.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a superhero film fight coordinator capturing the climactic pre-battle stance.</role>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-5s): Slow push-in on the hero from behind, cape settling in the wind.
Beat 2 (5-9s): Subject turns toward camera, locks eyes, slight flick of an energy crack.
Beat 3 (9-12s): Camera cuts to a low-angle wide, full silhouette against the burning city.
</narrative_arc>
<subject>Subject in {{costume: cape / armor / trench}}, identity preserved in face and jawline.</subject>
<scene>City skyline below, burning cars at street level, smoke layer.</scene>
<camera>Mix of dolly push and locked low angle.</camera>
<lighting>Orange amber firelight from below, cool blue sky above.</lighting>
<audio>Slow orchestral build, cape flap in wind, distant sirens.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps with 60fps inserts, 12 seconds, cinematic.</output>
<negative>no mask only, no other heroes in frame, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Marvel and DC climactic-stance convention: cape in wind + city below + dolly push + bass cue.
antiPatterns: Do not show the hero defeating anyone. Stance is the climax.
Do not pose the hero crouched. Standing full silhouette is canonical.

prompts.title: Anime mecha combat loop video pack
prompts.when: You want an 8-second loopable anime mecha combat clip with energy weapons.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a 90s anime mecha-animator keying a single combat loop.</role>
<scene>Charred urban battlefield, two humanoid mechs visible in silhouette, energy weapon exchanges.</scene>
<motion>Locked camera at low angle. The hero mech dodges, swings a beam saber. Slash frames (1-frame still + 1-frame smear) for impact. Loopable.</motion>
<camera>24mm low angle, locked.</camera>
<lighting>Cool moonlit night with orange muzzle flashes, cel-shaded.</lighting>
<audio>Energy weapon zap, mechanical servo whir, low rumbling impact.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 8 seconds, loopable, anime cel-shaded.</output>
<negative>no CG anime, no fantasy swords, no human pilot close-up.</negative>
notes: Pattern from 90s mecha anime canon (Gundam, Evangelion) for clip-style combat loops.
antiPatterns: Do not show the pilot. Cockpit interior only as cutaway.
Do not fade between shots. Hard cuts only.

prompts.title: Hanfu classical Chinese portrait pack
prompts.when: You want the subject in a Hanfu robe in a classical Chinese garden or bamboo grove.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a classical Chinese portrait photographer working with Hanfu costuming.</role>
<task>Render the subject in Hanfu robes in a classical Chinese garden setting.</task>
<subject>Subject in {{dynasty: Tang / Song / Ming}} Hanfu: layered robes with crossed collars, an embroidered sash, a simple hair ornament, identity preserved.</subject>
<setting>Classical Chinese garden: glazed tile pavilion, koi pond with lotus, ornamental rockery, ancient pine, bamboo grove in the background.</setting>
<camera>85mm eye-level, soft focus on background vegetation.</camera>
<lighting>Soft diffused daylight through cloud-filtered sun, koi pond reflections in the lower frame.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, classical Chinese color palette: jade greens, cinnabar, ink black.</output>
<negative>no modern clothing, no Western elements, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern inspired by the trending Hanfu Fashion Sketch / Living Hanfu series (https://youmind.com/prompts).
antiPatterns: Do not include a phoenix crown or wedding Hanfu. Daily-life Hanfu reads more authentically.
Do not use warm tungsten light. Soft daylight only.

prompts.title: Living Hanfu fashion sketch pack
prompts.when: You want a Hanfu-fashion-sketch of the subject with watercolor color notes and Pose-3D feel.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a fashion-illustration artist specialized in Hanfu lookbooks.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a posed Hanfu lookbook fashion sketch.</task>
<style>Hand-drawn graphite pencil sketch on cream paper, lightly painted with watercolor washes in muted Jade and Vermillion. Articulated joint indicators from a fashion croquis.</style>
<subject>Identity preserved in silhouette. Subject in flowing Hanfu sleeves, one sleeve extending out of frame.</subject>
<annotations>Calligraphy-style fabric labels in Chinese on the side: dynasty, garment name, fabric.</annotations>
<output>Aspect 4:5 portrait, photorealistic illustration, sketch grain.</output>
<negative>no harsh digital vectors, no anime, no colored pencil, no English labels.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the Living Hanfu Fashion Sketch trend on X (https://x.com) and Pinterest (https://youmind.com/prompts/living-hanfu-fashion-sketch-26701).
antiPatterns: Do not add cartoon characters in background.
Do not use English annotations. Chinese calligraphy only.

prompts.title: Korean beauty glass-skin portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a clean K-beauty glass-skin portrait of the subject in soft natural light.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a K-beauty brand photographer capturing a glass-skin close-up.</role>
<task>Render a close-up portrait of the subject with the canonical K-beauty glass-skin glow.</task>
<style>Skin looks like frosted glass: hydrated, dewy, light-reflecting, pore-less but not plastic. Soft pastel palette. Identity preserved.</style>
<makeup>Soft gradient lip, almost no eye makeup, slightly flushed cheek, well-groomed brows.</makeup>
<setting>Bright studio with a single window light, no busy background.</setting>
<camera>85mm macro at face level, very shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Soft ring-shaped key from upper-front, almost wrapping the cheekbone.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, glass-skin emphasis.</output>
<negative>no heavy contour, no Instagram filter, no heavy eyeliner, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern aligned with K-beauty editorial standards: glass-skin, gradient lip, well-groomed brows (https://www.allure.com/story/k-beauty-glass-skin).
antiPatterns: Do not over-do highlighting. Glass skin is hydration, not sheen.
Do not include lash extensions in this frame. Bare eyelashes are the genre.

prompts.title: Indian bridal red lehenga portrait pack
prompts.when: You want the subject as an Indian bride in red lehenga and gold jewelry.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an Indian wedding photographer capturing the bridal solo portrait.</role>
<task>Render the subject as a bride in traditional Indian bridal attire.</task>
<subject>Bride in deep red {{lehenga: Banarasi / Kanjivaram}} with gold zari, heavy kundan necklace set, maang tikka on forehead, nath (nose ring), kaleere hanging from wrists, identity preserved.</subject>
<setting>Marble floor of the wedding hall with floral strings overhead, candles in brass holders.</setting>
<camera>85mm, three-quarter full length, soft focus on background florals.</camera>
<lighting>Warm tungsten from the side, slight fill from a window.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, magazine bridal palette.</output>
<negative>no Western elements, no contemporary fashion, no text watermark.</negative>
notes: Pattern aligned with Indian bridal editorial conventions: heavy jewelry, red palette, marble hall, candlelit warm.
antiPatterns: Do not crop out the kaleere. The bridal charms are the genre tell.
Do not include the groom. Solo bridal only.

prompts.title: African wax-print fashion editorial pack
prompts.when: You want the subject in vibrant Ankara wax-print fashion on a Lagos rooftop at golden hour.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an African fashion editorial photographer based in Lagos.</role>
<task>Render the subject in vibrant wax-print fashion on a Lagos rooftop at golden hour.</task>
<subject>Subject in a tailored {{outfit: dashiki / agbada / Ankara suit}} in saturated wax-print textile, modern fit, identity preserved.</subject>
<setting>Lagos rooftop with low concrete edge, Makoko in the background, tropical trees.</setting>
<camera>50mm, three-quarter pose, soft focus on rooftops.</camera>
<lighting>Late-afternoon golden sun from the right, fill from the open sky.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, African editorial palette: saturated yellows, oranges, deep blues.</output>
<negative>no Western fashion, no muted palette, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Africa Rising Fashion editorial canon and Lagos Fashion Week coverage.
antiPatterns: Do not wash out the wax print. Pattern legibility is the genre.
Do not crop the feet. Full-length editorial framing.

prompts.title: Latin dance tropical color portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a vibrant Latin-dance portrait of the subject in salsa-saturated color.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Latin-music editorial photographer in Miami.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a vibrant salsa-dance-themed portrait.</task>
<subject>Subject in a flowing salsa dress or sharp salsa-suit in saturated {{color: red / fuchsia / saffron}}, mid-spin, identity preserved.</subject>
<setting>Miami rooftop at dusk, palm tree silhouettes, tiled wall with neon {{sign}}.</setting>
<camera>85mm, 1/30 shutter speed effect, slight motion blur on the dress sweep.</camera>
<lighting>Warm sunset key from behind, magenta kicker.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, salsa-saturated palette.</output>
<negative>no ballroom, no Latin ballad mood, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from salsa/Bachata editorial canon: vibrant color, motion-blur dress sweep, Miami rooftop palette.
antiPatterns: Do not freeze the dress completely. Motion sweep is the genre.
Do not include a partner. Solo spin is the frame.

prompts.title: Japanese cherry blossom cultural portrait pack
prompts.when: You want the subject under a canopy of cherry blossoms at peak bloom.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Tokyo cultural photographer shooting hanami season.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a Tokyo park under a canopy of cherry blossoms at peak bloom.</task>
<subject>Subject in a contemporary light trench coat, identity preserved, holding a small paper lantern or a petal.</subject>
<setting>Shinjuku Gyoen or Ueno park, fully blooming sakura canopy, soft pink petals falling, traditional lantern in the distance.</setting>
<camera>85mm, three-quarter framing, f/2.0, petals in soft focus.</camera>
<lighting>Soft diffused daylight, no harsh shadows, petals reflect light as speckled bokeh.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, soft pink and jade green palette.</output>
<negative>no anime, no logo, no Western cherry trees.</negative>
notes: Pattern aligned with hanami cultural portrait photography canon in Tokyo parks during peak bloom.
antiPatterns: Do not over-saturate pink. Soft focus pink is the genre.
Do not include crowds. Subject alone reads stronger.

prompts.title: Hanfu long-sleeve dance loop video pack
prompts.when: You want a 10-second loopable clip of the subject spinning in flowing Hanfu sleeves.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Chinese classical dance cinematographer filming a flowing sleeve-dance.</role>
<scene>Classical Chinese garden, subject in long-sleeved Hanfu, mid-spin with sleeves trailing.</scene>
<motion>Locked camera at chest level. Subject performs a single continuous slow rotation; sleeves catch the air and trace arcs. Loopable.</motion>
<camera>50mm eye-level, 60fps for smooth slow motion.</camera>
<lighting>Soft daylight, golden afternoon, mild backlight on sleeve edges.</lighting>
<audio>Soft guzheng arpeggio, distant bamboo-leaf rustle.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 60fps, 10 seconds, photorealistic, loopable.</output>
<negative>no male partner, no modern shoes, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the revived Chinese classical dance genre popular on Douyin and TikTok.
antiPatterns: Do not jump-cut mid-spin. Single continuous rotation is the loop anchor.
Do not animate the background trees. Light wind only on sleeves and hair.

prompts.title: Indian wedding sangeet dance video pack
prompts.when: You want a 14-second vibrant sangeet dance-floor clip with sparklers and confetti.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a Bollywood wedding sangeet cinematographer.</role>
<scene>Outdoor lawn lit with marigold lanterns and fairy lights. Subject in wedding lehenga twirling on the dance floor, sparklers held by cousins trailing behind, confetti falling.</scene>
<motion>Locked overhead dolly, descending slowly. Subjects dance with arms raised, twirls catch the slow-motion confetti.</motion>
<camera>24mm wide handheld, slight natural shake, 60fps slow-mo insert.</camera>
<lighting>Mixed gold fairy lights, stage spotlights in pink-amber, sparkler rim-light.</lighting>
<audio>Loud Bollywood track, dhol beats, crowd cheering.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 24fps with 60fps inserts, 14 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no Western wedding elements, no first dance alone, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from viral Indian sangeet reel genre on Instagram.
antiPatterns: Do not include a slow first dance. Sangeet is high-energy group dance.
Do not mute the dhol. Dhol is the genre.

prompts.title: Latin salsa spin dance loop video pack
prompts.when: You want a 10-second loopable salsa-spin clip of the subject with flowing dress.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a salsa dance cinematographer filming a single dancer spin.</role>
<scene>Outdoor tiled plaza at dusk with string lights overhead, the subject in a flowing salsa dress.</scene>
<motion>Locked camera at hip level. The subject performs a continuous salsa spin, dress flaring. Final pose holds in place; loopable.</motion>
<camera>35mm at hip level, 60fps.</camera>
<lighting>Warm tungsten from overhead cafe lights, magenta kicker from the side.</lighting>
<audio>Single bar of timbales + bongo loop, no voice.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 60fps, 10 seconds, photorealistic, loopable.</output>
<negative>no second dancer, no formal ballroom, no Western pop music.</negative>
notes: Pattern from the salsa-spin Reels/TikTok genre popular in 2024-2025.
antiPatterns: Do not show partner work. Solo spin only.
Do not freeze the dress with shutter speed. Motion sweep is the genre.

prompts.title: Concert crowd on-stage tour photo pack
prompts.when: You want the subject on stage at a concert, lights behind, crowd in silhouette.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a tour-photographer shooting a hero moment for a tour poster.</role>
<task>Render the subject on stage at a stadium concert, hand raised, lights behind, crowd a sea of silhouettes.</task>
<scene>Stadium stage from behind the subject. Stage lights blind the camera. The crowd is a sea of phone flashlight dots. Identity preserved.</scene>
<subject>In a tour outfit: graphic tee, statement jacket, in-ear monitor visible. Hand raised, mouth open mid-shout.</subject>
<camera>35mm low from behind, lens flare from stage spots.</camera>
<lighting>Hard colored stage spots, magenta and teal, backlit from behind the subject.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, dramatic concert palette.</output>
<negative>no small club, no soft studio light, no photoshop composites.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Live Nation tour poster canon: low backlit subject + sea of crowd phones + colored stage spots.
antiPatterns: Do not crowd the subject with band members. Solo frame is the genre.
Do not include a microphone in this exact frame. Hand raised only.

prompts.title: Jazz cafe candlelight portrait pack
prompts.when: You want a moody jazz-cafe portrait of the subject at a candlelit table.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a jazz-club portrait photographer in New Orleans.</role>
<task>Render a moody portrait of the subject at a candlelit table in a basement jazz club.</task>
<scene>Basement jazz club, brick walls, low ceiling, single candle on the table, saxophone player blurred in the back. Subject seated three-quarter.</scene>
<subject>Subject in a velvet jacket, low-lit face, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>50mm f/1.4, eye-level, very shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Candle key from the table, warm amber, red-gel rim from a side wall sconce.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, moody jazz palette.</output>
<negative>no bright daylight, no camera flash, no white walls.</negative>
notes: Pattern from basement jazz-club portrait convention: candle key, brick walls, velvet jacket, very shallow DOF.
antiPatterns: Do not include a piano on this exact frame. Sax player only.
Do not include other patrons visible. Empty venue mood.

prompts.title: Opera house balcony portrait pack
prompts.when: You want the subject in formal attire in the gilded boxes of a European opera house.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an editorial photographer capturing a private-box opera portrait.</role>
<task>Render the subject in a gilded opera-box balcony during an intermission.</task>
<scene>Italian opera house, gold-leafed balcony railing, red velvet curtain to the side, chandelier visible upper frame, audience blurred below.</scene>
<subject>Subject in a {{gown: black tie / floor-length}}, identity preserved, leaning slightly on the balcony rail, opera glasses in hand.</subject>
<camera>85mm, slightly low at box level, soft on the chandelier.</camera>
<lighting>Warm chandelier key, soft amber fill, deep red drapery shadows.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, dramatic warm palette.</output>
<negative>no modern formal wear, no casual sneakers, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern aligned with European opera house convention: gilded balcony, red velvet, chandelier, formal attire.
antiPatterns: Do not show the stage from the boxes. Only the gilded interior.
Do not pose the subject mid-laugh. Composed stare is the genre.

prompts.title: EDM festival crowd silhouetted pack
prompts.when: You want a subject lost in an EDM festival crowd with lasers and rigs above.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a music-festival photographer at a major EDM event.</role>
<task>Render the subject in the crowd at an EDM festival with confetti and lasers overhead.</task>
<scene>Outdoor festival main stage at night, lasers projecting from a curved roof rig, confetti mid-burst, the subject partway into a sea of hands-up fans.</scene>
<subject>Subject in festival outfit: holographic top, black shorts, sunglasses at night, identity preserved.</subject>
<camera>16mm ultra-wide on a stabilizer, hand-held eye-level, lens flare from lasers.</camera>
<lighting>Massive color wash from the main stage, magenta and cyan, with hard laser beams.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, festival saturated palette.</output>
<negative>no indoor stage, no clouds in the sky, no daytime festival.</negative>
notes: Pattern from Tomorrowland / EDC festival editorial canon: lasers, confetti, ultra-wide crowd shot, sunglasses at night.
antiPatterns: Do not crop the rig. The roof rig scale is the read.
Do not pose the subject separately from the crowd. Inside it.

prompts.title: Classical concert hall tribute pack
prompts.when: You want the subject as a soloist captured in mid-performance at a classical concert hall.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a classical-music editorial photographer at Carnegie or Vienna Musikverein.</role>
<task>Render the subject as a piano or violin soloist mid-performance, in a European concert hall.</task>
<scene>Carnegie-style hall, red velvet seats empty in the foreground, the soloist under a single overhead spotlight, soft chandelier glow from above.</scene>
<subject>Soloist at a Steinway grand piano or in violin position, identity preserved, mid-expression of performance, eyes closed in one frame.</subject>
<camera>85mm telephoto from the upper balcony, three-quarter framing.</camera>
<lighting>Single hard spotlight from above, dim ambient from the chandelier.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, rich warm concert-hall palette.</output>
<negative>no audience faces in close-up, no recording equipment, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from classical recital editorial canon: solo under one hard spot, empty foreground velvet.
antiPatterns: Do not capture the soloist looking at the audience. Eyes closed or on the instrument only.
Do not include microphones. Acoustic halls.

prompts.title: Bboy street dance freeze-frame pack
prompts.when: You want the subject frozen mid-breakdance move on a graffiti'd urban street.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a street dance photographer covering an outdoor bboy battle.</role>
<task>Render the subject frozen mid-breakdance move on an urban street with graffiti behind.</task>
<subject>Subject in breakdancer gear: track pants, oversized tee, sweatband, mid-freeze pose, identity preserved.</subject>
<setting>Outdoor asphalt lot, full wall of graffiti behind, an audience in a tight circle, slight motion-blur of other dancers.</setting>
<camera>24mm wide at low hip level, slight grain, 1/250 shutter lock.</camera>
<lighting>Late-afternoon sunlight raking across the wall, deep golden tone.</lighting>
<output>Aspect 4:5, photorealistic, urban dance palette.</output>
<negative>no studio, no logo, no text overlay, no neon.</negative>
notes: Pattern from outdoor bboy battle photojournalism canon: late-afternoon sun, graffiti wall, low angle.
antiPatterns: Do not place the subject head-on. Three-quarter dynamic angle reads stronger.
Do not pose the audience faces in close-up. Crowd silhouettes only.

prompts.title: Concert light-stick slow-mo loop video pack
prompts.when: You want a 10-second slo-mo clip of concert light-sticks waving in a dark arena.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a concert videographer capturing a light-stick wave through the arena.</role>
<scene>Dark arena, the crowd holds colored light-sticks, a slow wave rolls across the seats, stage off-screen but its lights wash the far upper tier.</scene>
<motion>Camera locked from the mid-tier, tilting very slowly across the seats as the wave rolls.</motion>
<camera>35mm, 120fps for slow motion.</camera>
<lighting>Pink and teal stage wash as the only source, single subject hands in foreground waving a stick.</lighting>
<audio>Ten thousand voices singing the chorus, light-stick wave hush, music lowered in mix.</audio>
<output>Aspect 9:16, 120fps, 10 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no faces in close-up, no clear band member shots, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from K-pop fan-cam and BTS concert wave videos that recur as viral reels.
antiPatterns: Do not stage faces close to the lens. Crowd silhouettes only.
Do not include visible choirs. Generic concert only.

prompts.title: Jazz quartet candlelit video pack
prompts.when: You want a 12-second smoke-veiled jazz quartet performance in a basement club.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a jazz video-session director.</role>
<scene>Basement jazz club, single overhead candle. Quartet: piano, double bass, drums, saxophone.</scene>
<motion>Locked medium close on the saxophone player, fingers on keys, ribbon of smoke in the foreground from a stage-left cigarette.</motion>
<camera>50mm, f/1.4, eye-level, very shallow depth.</camera>
<lighting>Candle-only key, deep red side-gel, the only spec highlights on brass.</lighting>
<audio>Solo saxophone line, brushed drums, walking bass line, ambient jazz-room murmur.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 12 seconds, photorealistic, moody.</output>
<negative>no stage lights, no broad lighting, no text overlay.</negative>
notes: Pattern from classic jazz-club video sessions, only the saxophone player in focus per the genre.
antiPatterns: Do not switch angles. Locked frame is the genre.
Do not include the audience in frame. Pure performance only.

prompts.title: Opera finale curtain call video pack
prompts.when: You want a 15-second opera finale with the curtain rising and the soloist bowing.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are an opera-house broadcast videographer capturing the curtain call.</role>
<scene>Closed red velvet stage curtain, the baton has dropped, the audience rises.</scene>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-5s): Closed curtain, audience on their feet, applause thundering.
Beat 2 (5-9s): Curtain rises slowly, revealing the soloist and small cast in a final tableau.
Beat 3 (9-15s): The soloist steps forward, takes a deep bow, brings the conductor on stage, both bow together.
</narrative_arc>
<camera>Locked mid-orchestra wide, no zoom.</camera>
<lighting>Soft warm stage light after curtain rises, ceiling chandeliers on dim.</lighting>
<audio>Thunderous applause building, single solo trumpet call, curtain sway.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 15 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no close-up of the soloist face during the bow, no text overlay, no conductor cutaway.</negative>
notes: Pattern from opera-house broadcast curtain call canon: curtain rise + deep bow + conductor join.
antiPatterns: Do not skip the curtain rise. The lift is the climax.
Do not cut to the conductor. Wide frame holds the genre.

prompts.title: EDM festival laser burst video pack
prompts.when: You want a 12-second festival laser burst at the climax of an EDM set.
prompts.prompt:
<role>You are a festival-camera operator on the front-of-house rig.</role>
<narrative_arc>
Beat 1 (0-4s): Wide of stage at the drop, lights dim.
Beat 2 (4-6s): Lasers fire simultaneously from multiple rigs, crisscrossing.</beat_2>
Beat 3 (6-9s): Drop hits, confetti cannons mid-burst, crowd loses it.
Beat 4 (9-12s): Camera cuts to a tight on the DJ booth with fist raised.
</narrative_arc>
<scene>Outdoor main stage, visible crowd of 50,000, motion of hands in the air.</scene>
<camera>Locked jib camera down low, then whip-tilt up to the DJ booth.</camera>
<lighting>Hard laser bursts in magenta, cyan, lime green; backlit by stage spot.</lighting>
<audio>Build-up synth line, the bass drop, crowd roar.</audio>
<output>Aspect 16:9, 24fps, 12 seconds, photorealistic.</output>
<negative>no daytime festival, no indoor stage, no band instruments on stage.</negative>
notes: Pattern from festival front-of-house canon: lasers as the fade-out reveal + confetti on the drop.
antiPatterns: Do not put the lasers at low contrast. Maximum intensity on the burst beat.
Do not skip the build-up beat. Drop needs anticipation.
